<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
Óô† <meta charset="UTF-8"/>
Óô† <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no"/>
Óô† <meta name="theme-color" content="#1A3A5C"/>
Óô† <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes"/>
Óô† <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="black-translucent"/>
Óô† <title>BS M√≥veis Estofados ‚ÄĒ Sistema de Vendas</title>
Óô† <script src="https://unpkg.com/react@18/umd/react.production.min.js" crossorigin></script>
Óô† <script src="https://unpkg.com/react-dom@18/umd/react-dom.production.min.js" crossorigin>
</script>
Óô† <script src="https://unpkg.com/recharts@2.8.0/umd/Recharts.min.js"></script>
Óô† <script src="https://unpkg.com/@babel/standalone/babel.min.js"></script>
Óô† <style>
Óô†Óô†Óô† *{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
Óô†Óô†Óô† body{font-family:Arial,sans-serif;background:#F0F4FA;-webkit-tap-highlight-
color:transparent}
Óô†Óô†Óô† select,input,textarea,button{font-family:Arial,sans-serif}
Óô†Óô†Óô† ::-webkit-scrollbar{width:4px;height:4px}
Óô†Óô†Óô† ::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:#f1f1f1}
Óô†Óô†Óô† ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:#1A3A5C;border-radius:2px}
Óô†Óô†Óô† a{-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}
Óô† </style>
</head>
<body>
<div id="root"></div>
<script>
/* ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ localStorage adapter para window.storage ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ */
window.storage = {
Óô† get: function(key, shared) {
Óô†Óô†Óô† return new Promise(function(resolve, reject) {
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† try {
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† var val = localStorage.getItem(key);
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† if (val === null) reject(new Error('Key not found: ' + key));
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† else resolve({ key: key, value: val, shared: !!shared });
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† } catch(e) { reject(e); }
Óô†Óô†Óô† });
Óô† },
Óô† set: function(key, value, shared) {
Óô†Óô†Óô† return new Promise(function(resolve) {
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† try {
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† localStorage.setItem(key, typeof value === 'string' ? value : JSON.stringify(value));
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† resolve({ key: key, value: value, shared: !!shared });
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† } catch(e) { resolve(null); }
Óô†Óô†Óô† });
Óô† },
Óô† delete: function(key, shared) {
Óô†Óô†Óô† return new Promise(function(resolve) {
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† try { localStorage.removeItem(key); } catch(e) {}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† resolve({ key: key, deleted: true, shared: !!shared });
Óô†Óô†Óô† });
Óô† },
Óô† list: function(prefix, shared) {
Óô†Óô†Óô† return new Promise(function(resolve) {
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† var keys = [];
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† try {
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† for (var i = 0; i < localStorage.length; i++) {
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† var k = localStorage.key(i);
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† if (!prefix || k.startsWith(prefix)) keys.push(k);
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† }
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† } catch(e) {}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† resolve({ keys: keys, prefix: prefix, shared: !!shared });
Óô†Óô†Óô† });
Óô† }
};
</script>
<script type="text/babel">
const { useState, useRef, useEffect } = React;
const { BarChart, Bar, XAxis, YAxis, Tooltip, ResponsiveContainer, Cell } = Recharts;
/* ‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź
Óô†Óô† LOGO
‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź */
function LogoBS({size=44}) {
Óô† return (
Óô†Óô†Óô† <svg width={size} height={size} viewBox="0 0 100 100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <rect width="100" height="100" rx="14" fill="#EAF4FF"/>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <ellipse cx="50" cy="68" rx="40" ry="7" fill="none" stroke="#00BCD4" strokeWidth="3.5"/>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <path d="M 18 72 Q 52 60 82 72" fill="none" stroke="#C62828" strokeWidth="2.5"
strokeLinecap="round"/>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <text x="5" y="70" fontFamily="Georgia,serif" fontSize="58" fontWeight="bold"
fill="#1565C0">B</text>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <text x="50" y="70" fontFamily="Georgia,serif" fontSize="58" fontWeight="bold"
fill="#7B1FA2">S</text>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <text x="50" y="15" fontFamily="Arial,sans-serif" fontSize="11" fontWeight="bold"
fill="#37474F" textAnchor="middle" letterSpacing="2">GRUPO</text>
Óô†Óô†Óô† </svg>
Óô† );
}
/* ‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź
Óô†Óô† CONSTANTES
‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź */
var SK = "bsmoveis-unified-v3";
var ETAPAS = [
Óô† {id:"contato",Óô†Óô† label:"
ūüďě

};
var PRECOS_ORIG = {
Óô† "Sof√° Simples":Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {"2 lugares":
{ess:"1.500",exe:"1.750",pre:"2.100",novo:"4.500"},"3 lugares":

/* ‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź
Óô†Óô† HELPERS
‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź */
function toN(v){return parseFloat(String(v||"0").replace(/\./g,"").replace(",","."))||0;}
function fBR(n){return n.toLocaleString("pt-BR",
{minimumFractionDigits:2,maximumFractionDigits:2});}
function parc(n){return fBR(n/0.8/10);}
function hoje(){return new Date().toLocaleDateString("pt-BR");}
function agora(){return new Date().toLocaleTimeString("pt-BR",{hour:"2-digit",minute:"2-
digit"});}
function mesAtual(){var d=new Date();return d.getFullYear()+"-
"+String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,"0");}
function novoItem(){return
{id:Math.random(),tipo:TIPOS[0],variante:Object.keys(PRECOS_ORIG[TIPOS[0]])
[0],overEss:"",overExe:"",overPre:""};}
function nomeExib(c){return c.nome||c.telefone||"Cliente";}
function prNome(c){return c.nome?c.nome.split(" ")[0]:(c.telefone||"Cliente");}
function etapaInfo(id){return ETAPAS.find(function(e){return e.id===id;})||ETAPAS[0];}
function sprodInfo(id){return SPRODS.find(function(s){return s.id===id;})||SPRODS[0];}
function diasSemContato(c){if(!c.dataUltimoContato)return 999;return Math.floor((Date.now()-
new Date(c.dataUltimoContato).getTime())/86400000);}
function diasParaEntrega(c){if(!c.dataEntrega)return null;return Math.ceil((new
Date(c.dataEntrega+"T23:59:59").getTime()-Date.now())/86400000);}
function prazoInfo(dias){if(dias===null)return null;if(dias<0)return{label:"
‚ö†
"+Math.abs(dias)+"d atrasado",cor:"#C62828",bg:"#FFEBEE"};if(dias===0)return{label:"
ūüö®
Entrega
hoje!",cor:"#C62828",bg:"#FFEBEE"};if(dias<=2)return{label:"
ūüĒī
"+dias+"d para
entrega",cor:"#C62828",bg:"#FFEBEE"};if(dias<=5)return{label:"
ūüü°
"+dias+"d para
entrega",cor:"#F57F17",bg:"#FFF8E7"};return{label:"
ūüüĘ
"+dias+"d para
entrega",cor:"#1B5E20",bg:"#E8F5E9"};}
function novoCliente(nome,tel,vendedor){return{id:Math.random(),nome:
(nome||"").trim(),telefone:(tel||"").trim(),vendedor:vendedor||"",etapa:"contato",itens:
[novoItem()],obs:[],criadoEm:new Date().toISOString(),atualizadoEm:new
Date().toISOString(),dataUltimoContato:new
Date().toISOString(),dataColeta:"",dataEntrega:"",statusProducao:"aguardando",fotosAntes:
[],fotosDepois:
[],entradaPaga:"0",saldoPago:"0",planoEscolhido:"",desconto:"0",custoTecido:"0",custoEspuma:"0
",custoMaoObra:"0",notaSatisfacao:null,indicouCliente:false,tecidoEscolhido:"",corEscolhida:""
,codigoRastreio:String(Math.floor(100000+Math.random()*900000)),indicadoPor:"",};}
function gerarCodigoCliente(c){if(!c)return "";var
cod=String(c.codigoRastreio||"").trim();if(cod.length===6)return cod;var
str=String(c.id||"").replace("0.","").replace(".","").slice(-8);return
String((parseInt(str)||0)%900000+100000);}
function catDeTipo(tipo){return CATEGORIAS.find(function(c){return
c.tipos.indexOf(tipo)!==-1;})||CATEGORIAS[0];}
function gerarMensagem(itens,precos,nomeCliente,emp){
Óô† var e=emp||{nome:"BS M√≥veis Estofados",whatsapp:"5571985039240",cidade:"Salvador e Lauro de
Freitas",saudacao:"Aqui √© da *BS M√≥veis Estofados* e preparei"};
Óô† if(!itens||itens.length===0)return "";
Óô† var te=0,tx=0,tp=0;
Óô† itens.forEach(function(it){var p=precos[it.tipo]&&precos[it.tipo][it.variante];if(p)
{te+=toN(it.overEss||p.ess);tx+=toN(it.overExe||p.exe);tp+=toN(it.overPre||p.pre);}});
Óô† var prazos=itens.map(function(it){return PRAZOS[it.tipo]||15;});
Óô† var maxP=Math.max.apply(null,prazos),minP=Math.min.apply(null,prazos);
Óô† var prazoStr=minP===maxP?(minP+" dias √ļteis"):(minP+" a "+maxP+" dias √ļteis");
Óô† var lista=itens.map(function(it,i){
Óô†Óô†Óô† var p=precos[it.tipo]&&precos[it.tipo][it.variante];
Óô†Óô†Óô† var v=(it.variante&&it.variante!=="Padr√£o")?" ‚ÄĒ "+it.variante:"";

ūüÜö
Sof√° novo custaria: R$ "+p.novo:"";
Óô†Óô†Óô† var essVal=it.overEss||(p?p.ess:"‚ÄĒ");var exeVal=it.overExe||(p?p.exe:"‚ÄĒ");var
preVal=it.overPre||(p?p.pre:"‚ÄĒ");
Óô†Óô†Óô† return "
ūüďĆ
"+(i+1)+". *"+it.tipo+v+"*\nÓô†Óô†
ūüĒĶ
R$ "+essVal+"Óô†
‚≠ź
R$ "+exeVal+"Óô†
ūüíé
R$
"+preVal+novoLine;

";

10x de R$ "+parc(te),"","‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ","
‚≠ź
*PLANO EXECUTIVO ‚ÄĒ R$ "+fBR(tx)+"*","‚ėÖ MAIS ESCOLHIDO ‚ėÖ","‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ","
ūüé®
Tecidos:",TECIDOS_NOMES.exe,"
ūüõŹ
Espuma D-28 inclusa","
ūüíį
√Ä vista: R$ "+fBR(tx),"
ūüí≥
10x de R$
"+parc(tx),"","‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ","
ūüíé
*PLANO PREMIUM ‚ÄĒ R$
"+fBR(tp)+"*","‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ","
ūüé®
Tecidos:",TECIDOS_NOMES.pre,"‚ú¶ Linho
Imperme√°vel e AquaBlock ‚ÄĒ imperme√°veis de f√°brica!","
ūüõŹ
Espuma D-33 (alta densidade)
inclusa","
ūüíį
√Ä vista: R$ "+fBR(tp),"
ūüí≥
10x de R$ "+parc(tp),"","‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ","‚ŹĪ
*PRAZO:* "+prazoStr,"
ūüõ°
*GARANTIA:* 12 meses","
ūüé®
*MOSTRU√ĀRIO:* levamos at√© voc√™","
ūüďĪ
*SIMULA√á√ÉO:* antes de come√ßar","‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ","","Qual op√ß√£o faz mais sentido
para voc√™?
ūüėä
"].join("\n");
}
/* ‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź
Óô†Óô† TELA SENHA
‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź */
function TelaSenha({onOk}) {
Óô† const [senha,setSenha]=useState("");
Óô† const [erro,setErro]=useState(false);
Óô† const SENHA_CORRETA="bsmoveis2025";
Óô† function verificar(){if(senha===SENHA_CORRETA)
{onOk();}else{setErro(true);setSenha("");setTimeout(()=>setErro(false),2500);}}
Óô† return (
Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{fontFamily:"Arial,sans-serif",background:"linear-
gradient(135deg,#1A3A5C,#2A5280)",minHeight:"100vh",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justify
Content:"center",padding:"16px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{background:"#FFF",borderRadius:"22px",padding:"40px
28px",maxWidth:"380px",width:"100%",boxShadow:"0 24px 64px
rgba(0,0,0,0.28)",textAlign:"center"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"center",marginBottom:"12px"}}><LogoBS
size={64}/></div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{fontWeight:"900",fontSize:"21px",color:"#1A3A5C",marginBottom:"4px"}}>BS
M√ďVEIS ESTOFADOS</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{fontSize:"11px",color:"#C8A84B",fontWeight:"800",marginBottom:"28px",textTransform:"uppercas
e",letterSpacing:"2px"}}>Acesso Restrito</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <p style={{fontSize:"14px",color:"#6B7A8D",marginBottom:"14px"}}>Digite a senha de
acesso</p>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <input type="password" value={senha} onChange={e=>setSenha(e.target.value)} onKeyDown=
{e=>e.key==="Enter"&&verificar()} placeholder="Senha..." autoFocus
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† style={{width:"100%",padding:"13px",borderRadius:"12px",border:erro?"2px solid
#C62828":"1.5px solid #DDD",fontSize:"15px",outline:"none",boxSizing:"border-
box",textAlign:"center",marginBottom:"8px",background:erro?"#FFEBEE":"#FFF"}}/>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {erro&&<p style=
{{color:"#C62828",fontSize:"13px",fontWeight:"bold",marginBottom:"8px"}}>
‚ĚĆ
Senha incorreta.
Tente novamente.</p>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <button onClick={verificar} style=
{{width:"100%",padding:"14px",borderRadius:"14px",border:"none",background:senha.trim()?"#1A3A
5C":"#CCC",color:"#FFF",fontWeight:"bold",fontSize:"15px",cursor:senha.trim()?"pointer":"defau
lt",marginTop:"4px"}}>Entrar ‚Üí</button>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <p style={{fontSize:"11px",color:"#BBB",marginTop:"18px"}}>Senha padr√£o:
<strong>bsmoveis2025</strong></p>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <p style={{fontSize:"10px",color:"#CCC",marginTop:"6px"}}>Altere no c√≥digo antes de
publicar</p>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô† );
}
/* ‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź
Óô†Óô† TELA LOGIN
‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź */
function TelaLogin({onLogin}) {
Óô† const [nome,setNome]=useState("");
Óô† return (
Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{fontFamily:"Arial,sans-serif",background:"linear-
gradient(135deg,#1A3A5C,#2A5280)",minHeight:"100vh",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justify
Content:"center",padding:"16px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{background:"#FFF",borderRadius:"22px",padding:"40px
28px",maxWidth:"380px",width:"100%",boxShadow:"0 24px 64px
rgba(0,0,0,0.28)",textAlign:"center"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"center",marginBottom:"12px"}}><LogoBS
size={64}/></div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{fontWeight:"900",fontSize:"21px",color:"#1A3A5C",marginBottom:"4px"}}>GRUPO BS M√ďVEIS</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{fontSize:"11px",color:"#C8A84B",fontWeight:"800",marginBottom:"28px",textTransform:"uppercas
e",letterSpacing:"2px"}}>Sistema Completo de Vendas</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <p style={{fontSize:"14px",color:"#6B7A8D",marginBottom:"14px"}}>Como voc√™ quer se
identificar?</p>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <input value={nome} onChange={e=>setNome(e.target.value)} onKeyDown=
{e=>e.key==="Enter"&&nome.trim()&&onLogin(nome.trim())} placeholder="Seu nome (ex: Jo√£o,
Maria...)" autoFocus
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† style={{width:"100%",padding:"13px",borderRadius:"12px",border:"1.5px solid
#DDD",fontSize:"15px",outline:"none",boxSizing:"border-
box",textAlign:"center",marginBottom:"12px"}}/>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <button onClick={()=>nome.trim()&&onLogin(nome.trim())} style=
{{width:"100%",padding:"14px",borderRadius:"14px",border:"none",background:nome.trim()?"#1A3A5
C":"#CCC",color:"#FFF",fontWeight:"bold",fontSize:"15px",cursor:nome.trim()?"pointer":"default
"}}>Entrar no Sistema ‚Üí</button>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <p style={{fontSize:"11px",color:"#BBB",marginTop:"18px"}}>Dados salvos localmente
neste dispositivo.</p>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô† );
}
/* ‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź
Óô†Óô† ITEM CARD
‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź */
function ItemCard({item,idx,total,precos,onUpdate,onRemove}) {
Óô† const p=precos[item.tipo]&&precos[item.tipo][item.variante];
Óô† const [catSel,setCatSel]=useState(()=>catDeTipo(item.tipo).id);
Óô† const cat=CATEGORIAS.find(c=>c.id===catSel)||CATEGORIAS[0];
Óô† const tiposDaCat=cat.tipos.filter(t=>!!precos[t]);
Óô† const vars=Object.keys(precos[item.tipo]||{});
Óô† function handleCat(cid){setCatSel(cid);const
nc=CATEGORIAS.find(c=>c.id===cid);if(nc&&nc.tipos.length>0&&precos[nc.tipos[0]])onUpdate(item.
id,"tipo",nc.tipos[0]);}
Óô† const PLANOS=[
Óô†Óô†Óô† {label:"
ūüĒĶ
Essencial",field:"overEss",def:p?
p.ess:"",cor:"#37474F",bg:"#ECEFF1",borda:"#90A4AE"},
Óô†Óô†Óô† {label:"
‚≠ź
Executivo", field:"overExe",def:p?
p.exe:"",cor:"#1565C0",bg:"#E3F2FD",borda:"#90CAF9"},
Óô†Óô†Óô† {label:"
ūüíé
Premium",Óô†Óô† field:"overPre",def:p?
p.pre:"",cor:"#6A1B9A",bg:"#F3E5F5",borda:"#CE93D8"},
Óô† ];
Óô† return (
Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{background:idx%2===0?"#F7F9FF":"#FAFBFF",borderRadius:"14px",padding:"14px",marginBottom:"12
px",border:"1.5px solid rgba(26,58,92,0.10)"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-
between",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:"12px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <span style={{background:"#1A3A5C",color:"#FFF",borderRadius:"20px",padding:"3px
14px",fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:"bold"}}>Item {idx+1}</span>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {total>1&&<button onClick={()=>onRemove(item.id)} style=
{{background:"#FFEBEE",border:"none",color:"#C62828",borderRadius:"8px",padding:"4px
10px",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:"12px",fontWeight:"bold"}}>‚úē Remover</button>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{marginBottom:"10px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{fontSize:"10px",fontWeight:"bold",color:"#6B7A8D",marginBottom:"7px",textTransform:"uppercas
e"}}>‚Ď† Categoria</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:"6px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {CATEGORIAS.map(c=>{const ativa=catSel===c.id;return(
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <button key={c.id} onClick={()=>handleCat(c.id)} style={{padding:"8px
6px",borderRadius:"10px",border:"2px solid "+(ativa?c.cor:"transparent"),background:ativa?
c.bg:"#F0F4FA",color:ativa?
c.cor:"#6B7A8D",fontWeight:ativa?"bold":"600",fontSize:"11px",cursor:"pointer",textAlign:"left
",lineHeight:"1.3"}}>{c.label}</button>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† );})}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{marginBottom:"10px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{fontSize:"10px",fontWeight:"bold",color:"#6B7A8D",marginBottom:"5px",textTransform:"uppercas
e"}}>‚Ď° Servi√ßo</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <select value={item.tipo} onChange={e=>onUpdate(item.id,"tipo",e.target.value)} style=
{{width:"100%",padding:"10px 12px",borderRadius:"9px",border:"2px solid
"+cat.cor,fontSize:"13px",outline:"none",background:cat.bg,boxSizing:"border-
box",fontWeight:"bold",color:cat.cor}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {tiposDaCat.map(t=><option key={t} value={t}>{t}</option>)}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </select>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {vars.length>1&&<div style={{marginBottom:"12px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{fontSize:"10px",fontWeight:"bold",color:"#6B7A8D",marginBottom:"5px",textTransform:"uppercas
e"}}>‚ĎĘ Tamanho / Variante</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <select value={item.variante} onChange=
{e=>onUpdate(item.id,"variante",e.target.value)} style={{width:"100%",padding:"10px
12px",borderRadius:"9px",border:"1.5px solid
rgba(26,58,92,0.12)",fontSize:"13px",outline:"none",background:"#F7F9FC",boxSizing:"border-
box"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {vars.map(v=><option key={v} value={v}>{v}</option>)}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </select>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {vars.length===1&&<div style=
{{marginBottom:"12px",fontSize:"12px",color:"#6B7A8D",background:"#F7F9FC",borderRadius:"8px",
padding:"8px 12px"}}>
ūüďź
Variante: <strong>{vars[0]}</strong></div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{background:"#FAFBFF",borderRadius:"10px",padding:"10px",border:"1.5px solid
rgba(26,58,92,0.08)"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{fontSize:"10px",fontWeight:"bold",color:"#6B7A8D",marginBottom:"8px",textTransform:"uppercas
e"}}>‚Ď£ Pre√ßos</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:"8px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {PLANOS.map(pl=>{const cur=item[pl.field]!==""&&item[pl.field]!==undefined?
item[pl.field]:pl.def;const
editado=item[pl.field]!==""&&item[pl.field]!==undefined&&item[pl.field]!==pl.def;return(
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div key={pl.field}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{fontSize:"10px",fontWeight:"bold",color:pl.cor,marginBottom:"4px",textAlign:"center"}}>
{pl.label}</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <input value={cur} placeholder={pl.def} onChange=
{e=>onUpdate(item.id,pl.field,e.target.value.replace(/[^0-9.,]/g,""))} style=
{{width:"100%",padding:"9px 4px",borderRadius:"8px",border:"1.5px solid "+(editado?
pl.borda:"rgba(26,58,92,0.12)"),fontSize:"14px",fontWeight:"bold",color:pl.cor,outline:"none",
background:editado?pl.bg:"#FFF",boxSizing:"border-box",textAlign:"center"}}/>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {editado&&<div style=
{{fontSize:"9px",color:pl.cor,textAlign:"center",marginTop:"2px"}}>Padr√£o: {pl.def}</div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† );})}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <button onClick={()=>
{onUpdate(item.id,"overEss","");onUpdate(item.id,"overExe","");onUpdate(item.id,"overPre","");
}} style={{width:"100%",marginTop:"8px",padding:"6px",borderRadius:"7px",border:"1.5px dashed
#DDD",background:"transparent",color:"#AAA",fontSize:"10px",fontWeight:"bold",cursor:"pointer"
}}>
‚Ü©
Restaurar pre√ßos padr√£o</button>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {p&&p.novo&&<div style=
{{marginTop:"8px",fontSize:"11px",color:"#6A1B9A",textAlign:"center",background:"#F3E5F5",bord
erRadius:"8px",padding:"5px 10px",fontWeight:"600"}}>
ūüÜö
Sof√° novo equivalente: <strong>R$
{p.novo}</strong></div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô† );
}
/* ‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź
Óô†Óô† CLIENTE DETALHE
‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź */
function ClienteDetalhe({cliente,user,precos,empresa,onUpdate,onBack,onDelete}) {
Óô† const [subAba,setSubAba]=useState("itens");
Óô† const [pendingEtapa,setPendingEtapa]=useState(null);
Óô† const [novaObs,setNovaObs]=useState("");
Óô† const [copiado,setCopiado]=useState(false);
Óô† const [orcSalvo,setOrcSalvo]=useState(false);
Óô† const [draftItens,setDraftItens]=useState(cliente.itens||[]);
Óô† const [temAlter,setTemAlter]=useState(false);
Óô† const [urlFotoInput,setUrlFotoInput]=useState({antes:"",depois:""});
Óô† const txtRef=useRef(null);
Óô† useEffect(()=>{setDraftItens(cliente.itens||[]);setTemAlter(false);},[cliente.id]);
Óô† const itens=draftItens;
Óô† const totalEss=itens.reduce((s,it)=>{const p=precos[it.tipo]&&precos[it.tipo]
[it.variante];return s+(p?toN(p.ess):0);},0);
Óô† const totalExe=itens.reduce((s,it)=>{const p=precos[it.tipo]&&precos[it.tipo]
[it.variante];return s+(p?toN(p.exe):0);},0);
Óô† const totalPre=itens.reduce((s,it)=>{const p=precos[it.tipo]&&precos[it.tipo]
[it.variante];return s+(p?toN(p.pre):0);},0);
Óô† const planoValBruto=cliente.planoEscolhido==="ess"?totalEss:cliente.planoEscolhido==="pre"?
totalPre:totalExe;
Óô† const desconto=toN(cliente.desconto),planoVal=Math.max(0,planoValBruto-desconto);
Óô† const recebido=toN(cliente.entradaPaga)+toN(cliente.saldoPago),saldoDev=Math.max(0,planoVal-
recebido);
Óô† const custTotal=toN(cliente.custoTecido)+toN(cliente.custoEspuma)+toN(cliente.custoMaoObra);
Óô† const margem=planoVal>0?((planoVal-custTotal)/planoVal*100):0;
Óô† const ei=etapaInfo(cliente.etapa),sp=sprodInfo(cliente.statusProducao||"aguardando");
Óô† const tel=(cliente.telefone||"").replace(/\D/g,"");
Óô† const msg=gerarMensagem(itens,precos,prNome(cliente),empresa);
Óô† const waUrl=tel?("https://api.whatsapp.com/send?
phone=55"+tel+"&text="+encodeURIComponent(msg)):("https://api.whatsapp.com/send?
text="+encodeURIComponent(msg));
Óô† function upd(patch){onUpdate({...cliente,...patch,atualizadoEm:new
Date().toISOString(),dataUltimoContato:new Date().toISOString()});}
Óô† function updItens(novos){setDraftItens(novos);setTemAlter(true);}
Óô† function addItemC(){updItens([...itens,novoItem()]);}
Óô† function rmItemC(id){updItens(itens.filter(it=>it.id!==id));}
Óô† function updItemC(id,campo,valor){updItens(itens.map(it=>{if(it.id!==id)return
it;if(campo==="tipo")return{id:it.id,tipo:valor,variante:Object.keys(precos[valor]||{})
[0]||""};return{...it,[campo]:valor};}));}
Óô† function salvarCad(){onUpdate({...cliente,itens:draftItens,atualizadoEm:new
Date().toISOString()});setTemAlter(false);}
Óô† function addObs(){if(!novaObs.trim())return;upd({obs:[...(cliente.obs||[]),
{texto:novaObs.trim(),usuario:user,hora:agora(),data:hoje()}]});setNovaObs("");}
Óô† function salvarHistorico(){const entrada=
{id:Math.random(),data:hoje(),hora:agora(),usuario:user,itens:itens.map(it=>
({tipo:it.tipo,variante:it.variante})),totalEss:fBR(totalEss),totalExe:fBR(totalExe),totalPre:
fBR(totalPre)};upd({historicOrcamentos:[...(cliente.historicOrcamentos||
[]),entrada].slice(-15)});setOrcSalvo(true);setTimeout(()=>setOrcSalvo(false),2500);}
Óô† function copiar(){if(navigator.clipboard&&navigator.clipboard.writeText)
{navigator.clipboard.writeText(msg).then(()=>
{setCopiado(true);setTimeout(()=>setCopiado(false),3000);}).catch(fb);}else fb();}
Óô† function fb(){if(txtRef.current)
{txtRef.current.value=msg;txtRef.current.select();try{document.execCommand("copy");}catch(e)
{}}setCopiado(true);setTimeout(()=>setCopiado(false),3000);}
Óô† function baixarMsg(){const nome="orcamento-"+nomeExib(cliente).replace(/\s/g,"-")+"-"+new
Date().toISOString().slice(0,10)+".txt";try{const blob=new Blob([msg],
{type:"text/plain;charset=utf-8"});const url=URL.createObjectURL(blob);const
a=document.createElement("a");a.href=url;a.download=nome;document.body.appendChild(a);a.click(
);document.body.removeChild(a);URL.revokeObjectURL(url);}catch(e){copiar();}}
Óô† function addFotoUrl(tipo,url){if(!url||!url.trim())return;const
campo=tipo==="antes"?"fotosAntes":"fotosDepois";upd({[campo]:[...(cliente[campo]||
[]),url.trim()].slice(-10)});setUrlFotoInput(p=>({...p,[tipo]:"")));}
Óô† const sInp={width:"100%",padding:"10px 12px",borderRadius:"8px",border:"1.5px solid
rgba(26,58,92,0.10)",fontSize:"13px",outline:"none",background:"#F7F9FC",boxSizing:"border-
box"};
Óô† const sCard={background:"#FFF",borderRadius:"14px",padding:"16px",boxShadow:"0 2px 12px
rgba(26,58,92,0.08)",marginBottom:"12px"};
Óô† const SUBTABS=[["itens","
ūüďč
Itens"],["msg","
ūüí¨
Msg"],["financeiro","
ūüíį
Fin."],["fotos","
ūüďł
Fotos"],["obs","
ūüďĚ
Notas"]];
Óô† return (
Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{fontFamily:"Arial,sans-serif",minHeight:"100vh",background:"#F0F4FA"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <textarea ref={txtRef} readOnly style={{position:"absolute",left:"-9999px",top:0}}
defaultValue=""/>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{background:"linear-gradient(90deg,#1A3A5C,#2A5280)",padding:"12px 16px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <button onClick={onBack} style=
{{background:"transparent",border:"none",color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.65)",fontSize:"13px",cursor
:"pointer",marginBottom:"8px",padding:"0"}}>‚Üź Voltar ao CRM</button>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"flex-
start",flexWrap:"wrap",gap:"8px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{color:"#FFF",fontWeight:"bold",fontSize:"18px"}}>{nomeExib(cliente)}
</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.6)",fontSize:"11px",marginTop:"2px"}}>
ūüĒĎ
C√≥digo: <strong style={{color:"#C8A84B"}}>{gerarCodigoCliente(cliente)}</strong></div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {cliente.telefone&&<div style={{color:"#C8A84B",fontSize:"12px"}}>
ūüďĪ
{cliente.telefone}</div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"6px",flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <span style={{padding:"4px
10px",borderRadius:"20px",fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:"bold",background:ei.bg,color:ei.cor}}>
{ei.label}</span>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <span style={{padding:"4px
10px",borderRadius:"20px",fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:"bold",background:sp.bg,color:sp.cor}}>
{sp.label}</span>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{background:"#FFF",padding:"12px 16px",borderBottom:"1px solid
#EEE",overflowX:"auto"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:"bold",color:"#6B7A8D",marginBottom:"6px",textTransform:"uppercas
e"}}>Etapa de venda</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"inline-flex",gap:"5px",marginBottom:"10px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {ETAPAS.map(et=>{const atual=cliente.etapa===et.id;return(<button key={et.id}
onClick={()=>!atual&&setPendingEtapa(et.id)} style={{padding:"5px
10px",borderRadius:"20px",border:"none",background:atual?
et.cor:et.bg,color:atual?"#FFF":et.cor,fontWeight:"bold",fontSize:"10px",cursor:atual?"default
":"pointer",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{et.label}</button>);})}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {pendingEtapa&&<div style=
{{marginBottom:"10px",background:"#FFF3E0",borderRadius:"12px",padding:"12px
14px",border:"1.5px solid #E65100"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{fontSize:"12px",color:"#E65100",fontWeight:"bold",marginBottom:"8px"}}>Mover para <strong>
{etapaInfo(pendingEtapa).label}</strong>?</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"8px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <button onClick={()=>setPendingEtapa(null)} style=
{{flex:1,padding:"9px",borderRadius:"9px",border:"1.5px solid
#DDD",background:"#FFF",color:"#555",fontWeight:"bold",fontSize:"12px",cursor:"pointer"}}>Canc
elar</button>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <button onClick={()=>{upd({etapa:pendingEtapa});setPendingEtapa(null);}} style=
{{flex:2,padding:"9px",borderRadius:"9px",border:"none",background:etapaInfo(pendingEtapa).cor
,color:"#FFF",fontWeight:"bold",fontSize:"12px",cursor:"pointer"}}>
‚úÖ
Confirmar</button>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {(()=>{const tel2=(cliente.telefone||"").replace(/[^0-9]/g,"");const
info=MSGS_FOLLOWUP[cliente.etapa];const nomeP=cliente.nome?cliente.nome.split(" ")
[0]:"cliente";if(!info||tel2.length<10||["perdido"].includes(cliente.etapa))return
null;return(
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{marginBottom:"10px",background:"#EEF4FB",borderRadius:"12px",padding:"12px 14px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{fontSize:"11px",color:"#1A3A5C",fontWeight:"bold",marginBottom:"6px"}}>{info.titulo}</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <a href={"https://wa.me/55"+tel2+"?text="+encodeURIComponent(info.msg(nomeP))}
target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" style=
{{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",gap:"8px",padding:"11px",borderRa
dius:"10px",background:"#25D366",color:"#FFF",fontWeight:"bold",fontSize:"13px",textDecoration
:"none"}}>
ūüí¨
Enviar ‚ÄĒ {info.proximo}</a>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† );})()}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:"bold",color:"#6B7A8D",marginBottom:"6px",textTransform:"uppercas
e"}}>Status de produ√ß√£o</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"inline-flex",gap:"5px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {SPRODS.map(s=><button key={s.id} onClick={()=>upd({statusProducao:s.id})} style=
{{padding:"5px 10px",borderRadius:"20px",border:"none",background:
(cliente.statusProducao||"aguardando")===s.id?s.cor:s.bg,color:
(cliente.statusProducao||"aguardando")===s.id?"#FFF":s.cor,fontWeight:"bold",fontSize:"10px",c
ursor:"pointer",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{s.label}</button>)}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{background:"#FFF",padding:"0
16px",display:"flex",gap:"4px",borderBottom:"1px solid #EEE",overflowX:"auto"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {SUBTABS.map(st=><button key={st[0]} onClick={()=>setSubAba(st[0])} style=
{{padding:"10px
12px",border:"none",cursor:"pointer",fontWeight:"bold",fontSize:"12px",background:"transparent
",color:subAba===st[0]?"#1A3A5C":"#6B7A8D",borderBottom:subAba===st[0]?"3px solid
#1A3A5C":"3px solid transparent",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{st[1]}</button>)}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{padding:"14px 16px 80px",maxWidth:"680px",margin:"0 auto"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {subAba==="itens"&&<div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {itens.map((it,i)=><ItemCard key={it.id} item={it} idx={i} total={itens.length}
precos={precos} onUpdate={updItemC} onRemove={rmItemC}/>)}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <button onClick={addItemC} style=
{{width:"100%",padding:"12px",borderRadius:"10px",border:"2px dashed
#2A5280",background:"transparent",color:"#1A3A5C",fontWeight:"bold",fontSize:"13px",cursor:"po
inter",marginBottom:"12px"}}>+ Adicionar item</button>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr
1fr",gap:"8px",marginBottom:"12px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {[["
ūüĒĶ
Essencial",totalEss,"#ECEFF1","#37474F"],["
‚≠ź
Executivo",totalExe,"#E3F2FD","#1565C0"],["
ūüíé
Premium",totalPre,"#F3E5F5","#6A1B9A"]].map(x=>
<div key={x[0]} style=
{{background:x[2],borderRadius:"10px",padding:"10px",textAlign:"center"}}><div style=
{{fontSize:"10px",color:x[3],fontWeight:"bold"}}>{x[0]}</div><div style=
{{fontSize:"15px",fontWeight:"bold",color:x[3]}}>R$ {fBR(x[1])}</div><div style=
{{fontSize:"10px",color:x[3]}}>10x {parc(x[1])}</div></div>)}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {temAlter&&<button onClick={salvarCad} style=
{{width:"100%",padding:"12px",borderRadius:"10px",border:"none",background:"#1B5E20",color:"#F
FF",fontWeight:"bold",fontSize:"14px",cursor:"pointer",marginBottom:"12px"}}>
‚úÖ
Salvar
altera√ß√Ķes dos itens</button>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={sCard}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C",fontSize:"13px",marginBottom:"12px",borderBottom:"2px
solid #C8A84B",paddingBottom:"6px"}}>
ūüöó
Log√≠stica</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:"10px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div><div style=
{{fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:"bold",color:"#E65100",marginBottom:"4px"}}>
ūüöó
Coleta</div><input
type="date" value={cliente.dataColeta||""} onChange={e=>upd({dataColeta:e.target.value})}
style={{...sInp,background:"#FFF3E0"}}/></div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div><div style=
{{fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1B5E20",marginBottom:"4px"}}>
ūüöö
Entrega</div>
<input type="date" value={cliente.dataEntrega||""} onChange=
{e=>upd({dataEntrega:e.target.value})} style={{...sInp,background:"#E8F5E9"}}/></div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {subAba==="msg"&&<div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"8px",marginBottom:"8px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <button onClick={copiar} style=
{{flex:1,padding:"11px",borderRadius:"10px",border:"none",background:copiado?"#1B5E20":"#1A3A5
C",color:"#FFF",fontWeight:"bold",fontSize:"13px",cursor:"pointer"}}>{copiado?"
‚úÖ
Copiado!":"
ūüďč
Copiar"}</button>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <a href={waUrl} target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" style=
{{flex:1,padding:"11px",borderRadius:"10px",background:"#25D366",color:"#FFF",fontWeight:"bold
",fontSize:"13px",textAlign:"center",textDecoration:"none",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",
justifyContent:"center"}}>
ūüď≤
WhatsApp</a>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <button onClick={baixarMsg} style=
{{width:"100%",padding:"10px",borderRadius:"10px",border:"1.5px solid
#1A3A5C",background:"#EEF4FB",color:"#1A3A5C",fontWeight:"bold",fontSize:"13px",cursor:"pointe
r",marginBottom:"8px"}}>
‚¨á
Baixar or√ßamento (.txt)</button>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <button onClick={salvarHistorico} style=
{{width:"100%",padding:"10px",borderRadius:"10px",border:"1.5px solid
rgba(26,58,92,0.15)",background:orcSalvo?"#E8F5E9":"#FFF",color:orcSalvo?"#1B5E20":"#1A3A5C",f
ontWeight:"bold",fontSize:"12px",cursor:"pointer",marginBottom:"10px"}}>{orcSalvo?"
‚úÖ
Or√ßamento registrado!":"
ūüíĺ
Registrar envio deste or√ßamento"}</button>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <textarea ref={txtRef} value={msg} readOnly onClick={e=>e.target.select()} style=
{{width:"100%",minHeight:"300px",borderRadius:"12px",border:"1.5px solid
rgba(26,58,92,0.10)",padding:"12px",fontSize:"12px",fontFamily:"monospace",background:"#FAFAFA
",outline:"none",boxSizing:"border-
box",resize:"vertical",lineHeight:"1.65",color:"#1C2B3A"}}/>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {subAba==="financeiro"&&<div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={sCard}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C",fontSize:"13px",marginBottom:"12px"}}>
ūüíį
Controle
Financeiro</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{marginBottom:"14px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C",marginBottom:"8px",textTransform:"uppercas
e"}}>
‚úÖ
Plano escolhido</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:"8px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†
{[{val:"ess",icon:"
ūüĒĶ
",nome:"Essencial",total:totalEss,cor:"#37474F",bg:"#ECEFF1",borda:"#90A4
AE"},
{val:"exe",icon:"
‚≠ź
",nome:"Executivo",total:totalExe,cor:"#1565C0",bg:"#E3F2FD",borda:"#1565C0
"},
{val:"pre",icon:"
ūüíé
",nome:"Premium",total:totalPre,cor:"#6A1B9A",bg:"#F3E5F5",borda:"#6A1B9A"}
].map(plan=>{const ativo=cliente.planoEscolhido===plan.val;return(
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <button key={plan.val} onClick={()=>upd({planoEscolhido:ativo?"":plan.val})}
style={{padding:"12px 6px",borderRadius:"12px",border:ativo?("3px solid "+plan.borda):"2px
solid #EEE",background:ativo?plan.bg:"#FFF",cursor:"pointer",textAlign:"center"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{fontSize:"20px",marginBottom:"4px"}}>{ativo?"
‚úÖ
":plan.icon}
</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:"bold",color:ativo?
plan.cor:"#888"}}>{plan.nome}</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{fontSize:"12px",fontWeight:"bold",color:ativo?
plan.cor:"#AAA",marginTop:"3px"}}>R$ {fBR(plan.total)}</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </button>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† );})}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr
1fr",gap:"10px",marginBottom:"10px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div><div style=
{{fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:"bold",color:"#6A1B9A",marginBottom:"4px"}}>
ūüé®
Tecido</div><input
value={cliente.tecidoEscolhido||""} onChange={e=>upd({tecidoEscolhido:e.target.value})}
placeholder="Ex: Veludo Inca" style={sInp}/></div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div><div style=
{{fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:"bold",color:"#6A1B9A",marginBottom:"4px"}}>
ūüé®
Cor</div><input
value={cliente.corEscolhida||""} onChange={e=>upd({corEscolhida:e.target.value})}
placeholder="Ex: Cinza" style={sInp}/></div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{marginBottom:"10px"}}><div style=
{{fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:"bold",color:"#C62828",marginBottom:"4px"}}>
ūüŹ∑
Desconto (R$)
</div><input value={cliente.desconto||"0"} onChange=
{e=>upd({desconto:e.target.value.replace(/[^0-9.,]/g,"")})} style={sInp}/></div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{background:"#EEF4FB",borderRadius:"12px",padding:"14px",marginBottom:"14px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",marginBottom:"6px"}}>
<span style={{fontSize:"13px",color:"#6B7A8D"}}>Valor final:</span><span style=
{{fontSize:"14px",fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C"}}>R$ {fBR(planoVal)}</span></div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",marginBottom:"6px"}}>
<span style={{fontSize:"13px",color:"#6B7A8D"}}>Recebido:</span><span style=
{{fontSize:"14px",fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1B5E20"}}>R$ {fBR(recebido)}</span></div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-
between",paddingTop:"8px",borderTop:"1px solid rgba(26,58,92,0.10)"}}><span style=
{{fontSize:"13px",fontWeight:"bold",color:"#6B7A8D"}}>Saldo devedor:</span><span style=
{{fontSize:"15px",fontWeight:"bold",color:saldoDev>0?"#C62828":"#1B5E20"}}>R$ {fBR(saldoDev)}
</span></div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:"10px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {[["Entrada R$","entradaPaga"],["Saldo R$","saldoPago"]].map(x=><div key={x[1]}>
<div style={{fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C",marginBottom:"3px"}}>{x[0]}
</div><input value={cliente[x[1]]||"0"} onChange={e=>upd({[x[1]]:e.target.value.replace(/[^0-
9.,]/g,"")})} style={{...sInp,textAlign:"center",fontWeight:"bold"}}/></div>)}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={sCard}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C",fontSize:"13px",marginBottom:"12px"}}>
ūüßģ
Custo e
Margem</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr
1fr",gap:"8px",marginBottom:"14px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {[["Tecido","custoTecido"],["Espuma","custoEspuma"],["M√£o de
obra","custoMaoObra"]].map(x=><div key={x[1]}><div style=
{{fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C",marginBottom:"3px"}}>{x[0]}</div><input
value={cliente[x[1]]||"0"} onChange={e=>upd({[x[1]]:e.target.value.replace(/[^0-9.,]/g,"")})}
style={{...sInp,textAlign:"center",fontSize:"12px"}}/></div>)}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{background:margem>=40?"#E8F5E9":margem>=20?"#FFF8E7":"#FFEBEE",borderRadius:"12px",padding:"
14px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",marginBottom:"4px"}}>
<span style={{fontSize:"12px",color:"#6B7A8D"}}>Custo total:</span><span style=
{{fontSize:"13px",fontWeight:"bold"}}>R$ {fBR(custTotal)}</span></div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between"}}><span style=
{{fontSize:"13px",fontWeight:"bold"}}>Margem:</span><span style=
{{fontSize:"20px",fontWeight:"bold",color:margem>=40?"#1B5E20":margem>=20?"#F57F17":"#C62828"}
}>{margem.toFixed(1)}%</span></div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {subAba==="fotos"&&<div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {[["antes","
ūüď∑
Antes","#1A3A5C","fotosAntes"],["depois","
‚ú®
Depois","#1B5E20","fotosDepois"]].map(x=>(
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div key={x[0]} style={sCard}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{fontWeight:"bold",color:x[2],fontSize:"13px",marginBottom:"10px"}}>
{x[1]}</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"8px",marginBottom:"10px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <input value={urlFotoInput[x[0]]} onChange={e=>{const
v=e.target.value;setUrlFotoInput(p=>({...p,[x[0]]:v}));}} onKeyDown=
{e=>e.key==="Enter"&&addFotoUrl(x[0],urlFotoInput[x[0]])} placeholder="Cole o link da foto..."
style={{...sInp,flex:1}}/>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <button onClick={()=>addFotoUrl(x[0],urlFotoInput[x[0]])} style={{padding:"8px
14px",borderRadius:"8px",border:"none",background:x[2],color:"#FFF",fontSize:"12px",fontWeight
:"bold",cursor:"pointer"}}>+ Add</button>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {(cliente[x[3]]||[]).length===0?<div style=
{{textAlign:"center",color:"#6B7A8D",fontSize:"12px",padding:"16px 0"}}>Nenhuma foto</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† :<div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:"8px"}}>
{(cliente[x[3]]||[]).map((f,i)=><div key={i} style={{position:"relative"}}><img src={f} alt=""
style={{width:"100%",aspectRatio:"1",objectFit:"cover",borderRadius:"10px"}} onError=
{e=>e.target.style.display="none"}/><button onClick={()=>upd({[x[3]]:(cliente[x[3]]||
[]).filter((_,j)=>j!==i)})} style=
{{position:"absolute",top:"4px",right:"4px",background:"rgba(0,0,0,0.6)",border:"none",color:"
#FFF",borderRadius:"50%",width:"22px",height:"22px",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:"11px"}}>‚úē</but
ton></div>)}</div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† ))}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {["entregue","posvenda"].includes(cliente.etapa)&&<div style={sCard}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C",fontSize:"13px",marginBottom:"12px"}}>
‚≠ź
Avalia√ß√£o</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"8px",marginBottom:"12px"}}>{[1,2,3,4,5].map(n=>
<button key={n} onClick={()=>upd({notaSatisfacao:n})} style={{flex:1,padding:"10px
4px",borderRadius:"10px",border:"2px solid "+
(cliente.notaSatisfacao>=n?"#F57F17":"rgba(26,58,92,0.10)"),background:cliente.notaSatisfacao>
=n?"#FFF8E7":"#FFF",fontSize:"20px",cursor:"pointer"}}>{n<=cliente.notaSatisfacao?"
‚≠ź
":"‚ėÜ"}
</button>)}</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <label style=
{{fontSize:"13px",color:"#1C2B3A",fontWeight:"600",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:"8px
",cursor:"pointer"}}><input type="checkbox" checked={!!cliente.indicouCliente} onChange=
{e=>upd({indicouCliente:e.target.checked})} style={{width:"18px",height:"18px"}}/>Cliente
indicou algu√©m
ūüéČ
</label>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {subAba==="obs"&&<div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={sCard}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{fontWeight:"bold",color:"#C8A84B",fontSize:"13px",marginBottom:"12px"}}>
ūüéĀ
Indica√ß√£o</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{marginBottom:"12px"}}><div style=
{{fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:"bold",color:"#C8A84B",marginBottom:"4px"}}>Indicado por</div>
<input value={cliente.indicadoPor||""} onChange={e=>upd({indicadoPor:e.target.value})}
placeholder="Nome de quem indicou..." style=
{{...sInp,borderColor:"rgba(200,168,75,0.35)",background:"#FFFDF0"}}/></div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{marginBottom:"14px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <textarea value={novaObs} onChange={e=>setNovaObs(e.target.value)}
placeholder="Observa√ß√£o..." style=
{{...sInp,minHeight:"80px",resize:"vertical",lineHeight:"1.5"}}/>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <button onClick={addObs} disabled={!novaObs.trim()} style=
{{width:"100%",marginTop:"8px",padding:"11px",borderRadius:"10px",border:"none",background:nov
aObs.trim()?"#1A3A5C":"#CCC",color:"#FFF",fontWeight:"bold",fontSize:"13px",cursor:novaObs.tri
m()?"pointer":"default"}}>+ Salvar</button>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {(cliente.obs||[]).slice().reverse().map((o,i)=><div key={i} style=
{{background:"#FFF",borderRadius:"12px",padding:"14px",marginBottom:"8px",borderLeft:"3px
solid #1A3A5C",boxShadow:"0 1px 6px rgba(26,58,92,0.06)"}}><div style=
{{fontSize:"11px",color:"#6B7A8D",marginBottom:"6px"}}>
ūüĎ§
{o.usuario} ¬∑ {o.data} {o.hora}
</div><div style={{fontSize:"13px",color:"#1C2B3A",whiteSpace:"pre-wrap",lineHeight:"1.5"}}>
{o.texto}</div></div>)}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{marginTop:"24px",paddingTop:"16px",borderTop:"1px solid
rgba(26,58,92,0.10)"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <button onClick={()=>{if(window.confirm("Remover
\""+nomeExib(cliente)+"\"?"))onDelete(cliente.id);}} style=
{{width:"100%",padding:"11px",borderRadius:"10px",border:"1.5px solid
#C62828",background:"#FFEBEE",color:"#C62828",fontWeight:"bold",fontSize:"13px",cursor:"pointe
r"}}>
ūüóĎ
Remover este cliente</button>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô† );
}
/* ‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź
Óô†Óô† APP PRINCIPAL
‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź */
function App() {
Óô† const [user,setUser]=useState("");
Óô† const [senhaOk,setSenhaOk]=useState(false);
Óô† const [precos,setPrecos]=useState(PRECOS_ORIG);
Óô† const [clientes,setClientes]=useState([]);
Óô† const [tecidos,setTecidos]=useState([]);
Óô† const [metas,setMetas]=useState([]);
Óô† const [itensOrc,setItensOrc]=useState([novoItem()]);
Óô† const [tab,setTab]=useState("funil");
Óô† const [copiadoOrc,setCopiadoOrc]=useState(false);
Óô† const [salvando,setSalvando]=useState(false);
Óô† const [sync,setSync]=useState("ok");
Óô† const [ultimaSync,setUltimaSync]=useState("");
Óô† const [clienteSel,setClienteSel]=useState(null);
Óô† const [empresa,setEmpresa]=useState({nome:"BS M√≥veis
Estofados",whatsapp:"5571985039240",cidade:"Salvador e Lauro de Freitas",saudacao:"Aqui √© da
*BS M√≥veis Estofados* e preparei"});
Óô† const [filtroEtapa,setFiltroEtapa]=useState("todos");
Óô† const [filtroVendedor,setFiltroVendedor]=useState("todos");
Óô† const [busca,setBusca]=useState("");
Óô† const [modoKanban,setModoKanban]=useState(false);
Óô† const [modalNovo,setModalNovo]=useState(false);
Óô† const [novoC,setNovoC]=useState({nome:"",telefone:"",indicadoPor:""});
Óô† const [log,setLog]=useState([]);
Óô† const [editandoPreco,setEditandoPreco]=useState(null);
Óô† const [editVals,setEditVals]=useState({});
Óô† const [objecaoCop,setObjecaoCop]=useState(null);
Óô† const [iaMsgs,setIaMsgs]=useState([]);
Óô† const [iaInput,setIaInput]=useState("");
Óô† const [iaLoading,setIaLoading]=useState(false);
Óô† const
[novoTecido,setNovoTecido]=useState({nome:"",cor:"",metros:"0",minimo:"2",plano:"exe"});
Óô† const
[novaMeta,setNovaMeta]=useState({vendedor:"",meta:"0",comissaoPct:"5",mes:mesAtual()});
Óô† const [secaoConfig,setSecaoConfig]=useState("backup");
Óô† const [exportCopiado,setExportCopiado]=useState(false);
Óô† const [draftEmp,setDraftEmp]=useState(empresa);
Óô† const [empSalvo,setEmpSalvo]=useState(false);
Óô† const [showJsonArea,setShowJsonArea]=useState(false);
Óô† const [jsonText,setJsonText]=useState("");
Óô† const [pendingImport,setPendingImport]=useState(null);
Óô† const [importStatus,setImportStatus]=useState(null);
Óô† const txtRefOrc=useRef(null);
Óô† const iaBottomRef=useRef(null);
Óô† const ultimoJson=useRef(null);
Óô† const precosRef=useRef(precos);
Óô† const clientesRef=useRef(clientes);
Óô† const tecidosRef=useRef(tecidos);
Óô† const metasRef=useRef(metas);
Óô† const logRef=useRef(log);
Óô† const userRef=useRef(user);
Óô† const empresaRef=useRef(empresa);
Óô† useEffect(()=>{window.storage.get("bsmoveis-user",false).then(r=>
{if(r&&r.value)setUser(r.value);}).catch(()=>{});},[]);
Óô† useEffect(()=>{empresaRef.current=empresa;},[empresa]);
Óô† useEffect(()=>{clientesRef.current=clientes;},[clientes]);
Óô† useEffect(()=>{tecidosRef.current=tecidos;},[tecidos]);
Óô† useEffect(()=>{metasRef.current=metas;},[metas]);
Óô† useEffect(()=>{logRef.current=log;},[log]);
Óô† useEffect(()=>{userRef.current=user;},[user]);
Óô† useEffect(()=>{
Óô†Óô†Óô† if(!user)return;
Óô†Óô†Óô† carregar(false);
Óô†Óô†Óô† const id=setInterval(()=>carregar(true),20000);
Óô†Óô†Óô† return()=>clearInterval(id);
Óô† },[user]);
Óô† function carregar(silencioso){
Óô†Óô†Óô† if(!silencioso)setSync("loading");
Óô†Óô†Óô† window.storage.get(SK,true).then(r=>{
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† if(r&&r.value){
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† if(r.value===ultimoJson.current){if(!silencioso)setSync("ok");return;}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† ultimoJson.current=r.value;
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† const d=JSON.parse(r.value);
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† if(d.precos)setPrecos(d.precos);
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† if(d.clientes)setClientes(d.clientes);
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† if(d.tecidos)setTecidos(d.tecidos);
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† if(d.metas)setMetas(d.metas);
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† if(d.log)setLog(d.log.slice(-40));
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† if(d.empresa)setEmpresa(d.empresa);
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† }
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† if(!silencioso){setSync("ok");setUltimaSync(agora());}
Óô†Óô†Óô† }).catch(()=>{if(!silencioso)setSync("erro");});
Óô† }
Óô† function salvarTudo(np,nc,nt,nm,acao,ne){
Óô†Óô†Óô† const novoPrecos=np||precosRef.current;
Óô†Óô†Óô† const novoClientes=nc||clientesRef.current;
Óô†Óô†Óô† const novoTecidos=nt||tecidosRef.current;
Óô†Óô†Óô† const novoMetas=nm||metasRef.current;
Óô†Óô†Óô† const novoEmpresa=ne||empresaRef.current;
Óô†Óô†Óô† const nl=[...logRef.current,{user:userRef.current,acao,hora:agora()}].slice(-40);
Óô†Óô†Óô†
precosRef.current=novoPrecos;clientesRef.current=novoClientes;tecidosRef.current=novoTecidos;m
etasRef.current=novoMetas;logRef.current=nl;empresaRef.current=novoEmpresa;
Óô†Óô†Óô† if(np)setPrecos(np);if(nc)setClientes(nc);if(nt)setTecidos(nt);if(nm)setMetas(nm);if(ne)
{setEmpresa(ne);setDraftEmp(ne);}setLog(nl);
Óô†Óô†Óô† setSalvando(true);setSync("loading");
Óô†Óô†Óô† const payload=
{precos:novoPrecos,clientes:novoClientes,tecidos:novoTecidos,metas:novoMetas,log:nl,empresa:no
voEmpresa};
Óô†Óô†Óô† const json=JSON.stringify(payload);ultimoJson.current=json;
Óô†Óô†Óô† window.storage.set(SK,json,true).then(()=>
{setSync("ok");setUltimaSync(agora());setSalvando(false);}).catch(()=>
{setSync("erro");setSalvando(false);});
Óô† }
Óô† function login(nome){window.storage.set("bsmoveis-user",nome,false).catch(()=>
{});setUser(nome);}
Óô† function logout(){window.storage.delete("bsmoveis-user",false).catch(()=>
{});setUser("");setClienteSel(null);}
Óô† function criarCliente(){if(!novoC.nome.trim()&&!novoC.telefone.trim())return;const novo=
{...novoCliente(novoC.nome,novoC.telefone,user),indicadoPor:
(novoC.indicadoPor||"").trim()};salvarTudo(null,[...clientesRef.current,novo],null,null,"Novo
cliente:
"+nomeExib(novo));setModalNovo(false);setNovoC({nome:"",telefone:"",indicadoPor:""});setClient
eSel(novo);}
Óô† function atualizarCliente(cli){salvarTudo(null,clientesRef.current.map(c=>c.id===cli.id?
cli:c),null,null,"Atualizou: "+nomeExib(cli));setClienteSel(cli);}
Óô† function deletarCliente(id)
{salvarTudo(null,clientesRef.current.filter(c=>c.id!==id),null,null,"Removeu
cliente");setClienteSel(null);}
Óô† function addItemOrc(){setItensOrc(p=>[...p,novoItem()]);}
Óô† function rmItemOrc(id){setItensOrc(p=>p.filter(x=>x.id!==id));}
Óô† function updItemOrc(id,campo,valor){setItensOrc(prev=>prev.map(it=>{if(it.id!==id)return
it;if(campo==="tipo")return{id:it.id,tipo:valor,variante:Object.keys(precos[valor]||{})
[0]||""};return{...it,[campo]:valor};}));}
Óô† const msgOrc=gerarMensagem(itensOrc,precos,null,empresa);
Óô† const waUrlOrc="https://api.whatsapp.com/send?text="+encodeURIComponent(msgOrc);
Óô† function copiarOrc(){if(navigator.clipboard&&navigator.clipboard.writeText)
{navigator.clipboard.writeText(msgOrc).then(()=>
{setCopiadoOrc(true);setTimeout(()=>setCopiadoOrc(false),3000);}).catch(fbOrc);}else fbOrc();}
Óô† function fbOrc(){if(txtRefOrc.current)
{txtRefOrc.current.value=msgOrc;txtRefOrc.current.select();try{document.execCommand("copy");}c
atch(e){}}setCopiadoOrc(true);setTimeout(()=>setCopiadoOrc(false),3000);}
Óô† function baixarOrc(){const nome="orcamento-bsmoveis-"+new
Date().toISOString().slice(0,10)+".txt";try{const blob=new Blob([msgOrc],
{type:"text/plain;charset=utf-8"});const url=URL.createObjectURL(blob);const
a=document.createElement("a");a.href=url;a.download=nome;document.body.appendChild(a);a.click(
);document.body.removeChild(a);URL.revokeObjectURL(url);}catch(e){fbOrc();}}
Óô† function exportarJSON(){const dados=
{precos,clientes,tecidos,metas,log,empresa,exportadoEm:new
Date().toISOString(),versao:"v3"};const json=JSON.stringify(dados,null,2);try{const blob=new
Blob([json],{type:"application/json"});const url=URL.createObjectURL(blob);const
a=document.createElement("a");a.href=url;a.download="bsmoveis-backup-"+new
Date().toISOString().slice(0,10)+".json";document.body.appendChild(a);a.click();document.body.
removeChild(a);URL.revokeObjectURL(url);}catch(e){setJsonText(json);setShowJsonArea(true);}}
Óô† function copiarJSON(){const dados={precos,clientes,tecidos,metas,log,empresa,exportadoEm:new
Date().toISOString(),versao:"v3"};const
json=JSON.stringify(dados,null,2);setJsonText(json);setShowJsonArea(true);if(navigator.clipboa
rd&&navigator.clipboard.writeText)navigator.clipboard.writeText(json).then(()=>
{setExportCopiado(true);setTimeout(()=>setExportCopiado(false),3000);}).catch(()=>{});}
Óô† function importarJSON(e){const file=e.target.files[0];if(!file)return;const reader=new
FileReader();reader.onload=ev=>{try{const
d=JSON.parse(ev.target.result);if(!d.clientes&&!d.precos)throw new
Error("inv√°lido");setPendingImport(d);}catch(err)
{setImportStatus("erro");setTimeout(()=>setImportStatus(null),5000);}};reader.readAsText(file)
;e.target.value="";}
Óô† function confirmarImport()
{if(!pendingImport)return;salvarTudo(pendingImport.precos||null,pendingImport.clientes||null,p
endingImport.tecidos||null,pendingImport.metas||null,"Restaurou backup
JSON",pendingImport.empresa||null);setPendingImport(null);setImportStatus("ok");setTimeout(()=
>setImportStatus(null),5000);}
Óô† function salvarPreco(){if(!editandoPreco)return;const
np=JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(precos));np[editandoPreco.tipo][editandoPreco.variante]=
{ess:editVals.ess,exe:editVals.exe,pre:editVals.pre};salvarTudo(np,null,null,null,"Editou
pre√ßo: "+editandoPreco.tipo+" ‚ÄĒ "+editandoPreco.variante);setEditandoPreco(null);}
Óô† function salvarEmp(){salvarTudo(null,null,null,null,"Atualizou config
empresa",draftEmp);setEmpSalvo(true);setTimeout(()=>setEmpSalvo(false),2500);}
Óô† function buildPrompt(){const
precosTxt=Object.entries(precos).map(e=>Object.entries(e[1]).map(v=>e[0]+"‚ÄĒ"+v[0]+": Ess
R$"+v[1].ess+"|Exe R$"+v[1].exe+"|Pre R$"+v[1].pre).join("\n")).join("\n");const
cliTxt=clientes.length===0?"Nenhum cliente.":clientes.map(c=>{const tx=(c.itens||
[]).reduce((s,it)=>{const p=precos[it.tipo]&&precos[it.tipo][it.variante];return s+(p?
toN(p.exe):0);},0);return "‚ÄĘ "+nomeExib(c)+" | "+etapaInfo(c.etapa).label+" | R$"+fBR(tx)+" |
"+diasSemContato(c)+"d sem contato";}).join("\n");return "Voc√™ √© a ARIA, assistente
especialista em vendas da BS M√≥veis Estofados (Salvador/Lauro de Freitas, BA). Ajude a equipe.
Seja direta, pr√°tica, portugu√™s do Brasil.\n\nPRE√áOS:\n"+precosTxt+"\n\nPLANOS:
ūüĒĶ
Essencial(D-
23) |
‚≠ź
Executivo(D-28) ‚ÄĒ MAIS ESCOLHIDO |
ūüíé
Premium(D-33)\n\nCLIENTES:\n"+cliTxt;}
Óô† function enviarIA(){if(!iaInput.trim())return;const
pergunta=iaInput.trim();setIaInput("");setIaLoading(true);const novaMsg=
{role:"user",content:pergunta};const msgsAtual=
[...iaMsgs,novaMsg];setIaMsgs(msgsAtual);fetch("https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages",
{method:"POST",headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"},body:JSON.stringify({model:"claude-
sonnet-4-20250514",max_tokens:1000,system:buildPrompt(),messages:msgsAtual.map(m=>
({role:m.role,content:m.content}))})}).then(r=>r.json()).then(data=>{const texto=
(data.content&&data.content.find(b=>b.type==="text"))||{text:"N√£o entendi, tente
reformular."};setIaMsgs(p=>[...p,
{role:"assistant",content:texto.text}]);setIaLoading(false);setTimeout(()=>
{if(iaBottomRef.current)iaBottomRef.current.scrollIntoView({behavior:"smooth"});},100);}).catc
h(()=>{setIaMsgs(p=>[...p,{role:"assistant",content:"Erro ao conectar. Verifique a chave da
API Anthropic."}]);setIaLoading(false);});}
Óô† if(!senhaOk)return <TelaSenha onOk={()=>setSenhaOk(true)}/>;
Óô† if(!user)return <TelaLogin onLogin={login}/>;
Óô† if(clienteSel)return <ClienteDetalhe cliente={clienteSel} user={user} precos={precos}
empresa={empresa} onUpdate={atualizarCliente} onBack={()=>setClienteSel(null)} onDelete=
{deletarCliente}/>;
Óô† const vendedores=clientes.reduce((acc,c)=>
{if(c.vendedor&&!acc.includes(c.vendedor))acc.push(c.vendedor);return acc;},[]);
Óô† const cliFiltrados=clientes.filter(c=>{
Óô†Óô†Óô† if(filtroEtapa!=="todos"&&c.etapa!==filtroEtapa)return false;
Óô†Óô†Óô† if(filtroVendedor!=="todos"&&c.vendedor!==filtroVendedor)return false;
Óô†Óô†Óô† if(busca){const b=busca.toLowerCase().trim();const campos=
[nomeExib(c),c.telefone||"",c.tecidoEscolhido||"",gerarCodigoCliente(c),c.vendedor||"",
(c.itens||[]).map(it=>it.tipo).join("
")];if(!campos.some(v=>v.toLowerCase().includes(b)))return false;}
Óô†Óô†Óô† return true;
Óô† }).sort((a,b)=>new Date(b.atualizadoEm||0)-new Date(a.atualizadoEm||0));
Óô† const alertasCount=clientes.filter(c=>!
["perdido","posvenda","entregue"].includes(c.etapa)&&diasSemContato(c)>=3).length;
Óô† const totalFechados=clientes.filter(c=>
["fechado","entregue","posvenda"].includes(c.etapa)).length;
Óô† const taxaConv=clientes.length>0?(totalFechados/clientes.length*100):0;
Óô† const syncBg=sync==="ok"?"#E8F5E9":sync==="loading"?"#FFF8E7":"#FFEBEE";
Óô† const syncCor=sync==="ok"?"#1B5E20":sync==="loading"?"#7A6020":"#C62828";
Óô† const syncTxt=sync==="ok"?(ultimaSync?"
‚úÖ
"+ultimaSync:"
‚úÖ
OK"):sync==="loading"?"
‚Ź≥
‚Ä¶":"
‚ĚĆ
Erro";
Óô† const sInp={width:"100%",padding:"10px 12px",borderRadius:"8px",border:"1.5px solid
rgba(26,58,92,0.10)",fontSize:"13px",outline:"none",background:"#F7F9FC",boxSizing:"border-
box"};
Óô† const sCard={background:"#FFF",borderRadius:"14px",padding:"16px",boxShadow:"0 2px 12px
rgba(26,58,92,0.08)",marginBottom:"12px"};
Óô† const TABS=[["funil","
ūüĎ•
CRM"],["producao","
‚öô
Prod."],["financeiro","
ūüíį
Fin."],
["dashboard","
ūüďä
Dash"],["orcamento","
ūüďč
Or√ßamento"],["objecoes","
ūüõ°
Obje√ß√Ķes"],
["posvenda","
‚≠ź
P√≥s-Venda"],["ia","
ūü§Ė
ARIA"],["config","
‚öô
Config"]];
Óô† // Dashboard data
Óô† const meses6=[];
Óô† for(let mi=5;mi>=0;mi--){const d=new Date();d.setDate(1);d.setMonth(d.getMonth()-mi);const
key=d.getFullYear()+"-"+String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,"0");const
label=d.toLocaleDateString("pt-BR",
{month:"short"}).replace(".","");meses6.push({key,label:label.charAt(0).toUpperCase()+label.sl
ice(1),total:0,count:0});}
Óô† clientes.filter(c=>["fechado","entregue","posvenda"].includes(c.etapa)).forEach(c=>{const
dt=new Date(c.atualizadoEm||c.criadoEm||Date.now());const key=dt.getFullYear()+"-
"+String(dt.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,"0");const m=meses6.find(x=>x.key===key);if(m){const val=
(c.itens||[]).reduce((s,it)=>{const p=precos[it.tipo]&&precos[it.tipo][it.variante];return s+
(p?toN(p.exe):0);},0);m.total+=val;m.count+=1;}});
Óô† const maxBar=Math.max(...meses6.map(m=>m.total));
Óô† const CORES_BAR=["#B3C8E8","#90AED4","#6E94C0","#4C7AAC","#2A6098","#1A3A5C"];
Óô† const CustomTooltip=({active,payload})=>{if(!active||!payload||!payload.length)return
null;const m=payload[0].payload;return(<div style=
{{background:"#1A3A5C",borderRadius:"10px",padding:"10px 14px"}}><div style=
{{color:"#C8A84B",fontWeight:"bold",fontSize:"12px"}}>{m.label}</div><div style=
{{color:"#FFF",fontSize:"13px",fontWeight:"bold"}}>R$ {fBR(m.total)}</div><div style=
{{color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.65)",fontSize:"11px"}}>{m.count} fechamento{m.count!==1?"s":""}
</div></div>);};
Óô† const planos={ess:0,exe:0,pre:0};
Óô† clientes.filter(c=>["fechado","entregue","posvenda"].includes(c.etapa)).forEach(c=>
{if(c.planoEscolhido)planos[c.planoEscolhido]=(planos[c.planoEscolhido]||0)+1;});
Óô† return (
Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{fontFamily:"Arial,sans-serif",background:"#F0F4FA",minHeight:"100vh"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <textarea ref={txtRefOrc} readOnly style={{position:"absolute",left:"-9999px",top:0}}
defaultValue=""/>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {/* Modal editar pre√ßo */}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {editandoPreco&&<div style=
{{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,0.55)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",ju
stifyContent:"center",zIndex:1000,padding:"16px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{background:"#FFF",borderRadius:"18px",padding:"24px",maxWidth:"380px",width:"100%",boxShadow
:"0 24px 64px rgba(0,0,0,0.28)"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-
between",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:"18px"}}><div style=
{{fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C",fontSize:"17px"}}>
‚úŹ
Editar Pre√ßo</div><button onClick=
{()=>setEditandoPreco(null)} style=
{{background:"transparent",border:"none",fontSize:"20px",cursor:"pointer",color:"#6B7A8D"}}>‚úē
</button></div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{fontSize:"12px",color:"#6B7A8D",marginBottom:"14px"}}>
{editandoPreco.tipo} ‚ÄĒ {editandoPreco.variante}</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {[["
ūüĒĶ
Essencial","ess"],["
‚≠ź
Executivo","exe"],["
ūüíé
Premium","pre"]].map(x=><div
key={x[1]} style={{marginBottom:"12px"}}><div style=
{{fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C",marginBottom:"4px"}}>{x[0]} (R$)</div>
<input value={editVals[x[1]]||""} onChange={e=>{const val=e.target.value.replace(/[^0-
9.,]/g,"");setEditVals(p=>({...p,[x[1]]:val}));}} style={sInp}/></div>)}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"8px"}}><button onClick={()=>setEditandoPreco(null)}
style={{flex:1,padding:"11px",borderRadius:"10px",border:"1.5px solid
#DDD",background:"#FFF",color:"#555",fontWeight:"bold",fontSize:"13px",cursor:"pointer"}}>Canc
elar</button><button onClick={salvarPreco} style=
{{flex:1,padding:"11px",borderRadius:"10px",border:"none",background:"#1A3A5C",color:"#FFF",fo
ntWeight:"bold",fontSize:"13px",cursor:"pointer"}}>Salvar</button></div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {/* Modal novo cliente */}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {modalNovo&&<div style=
{{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,0.55)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",ju
stifyContent:"center",zIndex:1000,padding:"16px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{background:"#FFF",borderRadius:"18px",padding:"24px",maxWidth:"380px",width:"100%",boxShadow
:"0 24px 64px rgba(0,0,0,0.28)"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-
between",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:"18px"}}><div style=
{{fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C",fontSize:"17px"}}>
‚ěē
Novo Cliente</div><button onClick=
{()=>setModalNovo(false)} style=
{{background:"transparent",border:"none",fontSize:"20px",cursor:"pointer",color:"#6B7A8D"}}>‚úē
</button></div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{marginBottom:"14px"}}><div style=
{{fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C",marginBottom:"4px"}}>Nome</div><input
value={novoC.nome} onChange={e=>setNovoC(p=>({...p,nome:e.target.value}))} placeholder="Nome
do cliente" style={sInp} autoFocus/></div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{marginBottom:"14px"}}><div style=
{{fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C",marginBottom:"4px"}}>Telefone /
WhatsApp</div><input value={novoC.telefone} onChange={e=>setNovoC(p=>
({...p,telefone:e.target.value}))} placeholder="(71) 99999-9999" type="tel" style={sInp}/>
</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{marginBottom:"22px"}}><div style=
{{fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:"bold",color:"#C8A84B",marginBottom:"4px"}}>
ūüéĀ
Indicado por
(opcional)</div><input value={novoC.indicadoPor} onChange={e=>setNovoC(p=>
({...p,indicadoPor:e.target.value}))} placeholder="Nome de quem indicou..." style=
{{...sInp,borderColor:"rgba(200,168,75,0.35)",background:"#FFFDF0"}}/></div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"8px"}}><button onClick={()=>setModalNovo(false)}
style={{flex:1,padding:"11px",borderRadius:"10px",border:"1.5px solid
#DDD",background:"#FFF",color:"#555",fontWeight:"bold",fontSize:"13px",cursor:"pointer"}}>Canc
elar</button><button onClick={criarCliente} disabled=
{!novoC.nome.trim()&&!novoC.telefone.trim()} style=
{{flex:1,padding:"11px",borderRadius:"10px",border:"none",background:
(novoC.nome.trim()||novoC.telefone.trim())?"#1A3A5C":"#CCC",color:"#FFF",fontWeight:"bold",fon
tSize:"13px",cursor:"pointer"}}>Adicionar</button></div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {/* Header */}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{background:"linear-gradient(90deg,#1A3A5C,#2A5280)",padding:"10px
14px",display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-
between",alignItems:"center",flexWrap:"wrap",gap:"6px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:"10px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <LogoBS size={40}/>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div><div style={{color:"#FFF",fontWeight:"bold",fontSize:"14px"}}>GRUPO BS
M√ďVEIS</div><div style=
{{color:"#C8A84B",fontSize:"9px",fontWeight:"bold",letterSpacing:"1px",textTransform:"uppercas
e"}}>Sistema Completo de Vendas</div></div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"5px",alignItems:"center",flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {alertasCount>0&&<span style={{padding:"3px
8px",borderRadius:"20px",fontSize:"10px",fontWeight:"bold",background:"#FFEBEE",color:"#C62828
"}}>
ūüĒĒ
{alertasCount}</span>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <span style={{padding:"3px
8px",borderRadius:"20px",fontSize:"10px",fontWeight:"bold",background:syncBg,color:syncCor}}>
{syncTxt}</span>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <span style={{padding:"3px
8px",borderRadius:"20px",fontSize:"10px",fontWeight:"bold",background:"rgba(200,168,75,0.12)",
color:"#C8A84B"}}>
ūüĎ§
{user}</span>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <button onClick={logout} style={{padding:"3px
8px",borderRadius:"20px",fontSize:"10px",fontWeight:"bold",background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.12)"
,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.7)",border:"none",cursor:"pointer"}}>Sair</button>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {/* Tabs */}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{background:"#FFF",padding:"6px 8px",boxShadow:"0 1px 6px
rgba(0,0,0,0.07)",overflowX:"auto",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"inline-flex",gap:"4px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {TABS.map(t=><button key={t[0]} onClick={()=>setTab(t[0])} style={{padding:"7px
12px",border:"none",borderRadius:"8px",background:tab===t[0]?"#1A3A5C":"transparent",color:tab
===t[0]?"#FFF":"#6B7A8D",fontWeight:tab===t[0]?"bold":"600",fontSize:"11.5px",cursor:"pointer"
,whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{t[1]}</button>)}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {/* Conte√ļdo */}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{maxWidth:"720px",margin:"0 auto",padding:"14px 12px 80px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {/* ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ CRM / FUNIL ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ */}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {tab==="funil"&&<div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(4,1fr)",gap:"8px",marginBottom:"14px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {[["
ūüĎ•
","Total",clientes.length,"#EEF4FB","#1A3A5C"],
["
ūüďč
","Or√ßamentos",clientes.filter(c=>c.etapa==="orcamento").length,"#FFF3E0","#E65100"],
["
‚úÖ
","Fechados",totalFechados,"#E8F5E9","#1B5E20"],
["
‚ĚĆ
","Perdidos",clientes.filter(c=>c.etapa==="perdido").length,"#FFEBEE","#C62828"]].map(m=>
<div key={m[1]} style={{background:m[3],borderRadius:"12px",padding:"10px
6px",textAlign:"center"}}><div style={{fontSize:"18px"}}>{m[0]}</div><div style=
{{fontSize:"20px",fontWeight:"bold",color:m[4]}}>{m[2]}</div><div style=
{{fontSize:"9px",color:m[4],fontWeight:"bold",textTransform:"uppercase"}}>{m[1]}</div></div>)}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"8px",marginBottom:"8px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <input value={busca} onChange={e=>setBusca(e.target.value)} placeholder="
ūüĒć
Nome,
tel, c√≥digo..." style={{...sInp,flex:1}}/>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <button onClick={()=>setModoKanban(p=>!p)} style={{padding:"10px
13px",borderRadius:"10px",border:"1.5px solid "+
(modoKanban?"#1A3A5C":"rgba(26,58,92,0.15)"),background:modoKanban?"#1A3A5C":"#FFF",color:modo
Kanban?"#FFF":"#1A3A5C",fontWeight:"bold",fontSize:"15px",cursor:"pointer"}}>
{modoKanban?"‚ėį":"
ūüóā
"}</button>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <button onClick={()=>setModalNovo(true)} style={{padding:"10px
16px",borderRadius:"10px",border:"none",background:"#1A3A5C",color:"#FFF",fontWeight:"bold",fo
ntSize:"13px",cursor:"pointer",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>+ Novo</button>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {vendedores.length>1&&<div style=
{{display:"flex",gap:"6px",marginBottom:"10px",overflowX:"auto"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <button onClick={()=>setFiltroVendedor("todos")} style={{padding:"4px
12px",borderRadius:"20px",border:"none",background:filtroVendedor==="todos"?"#1A3A5C":"#EEF4FB
",color:filtroVendedor==="todos"?"#FFF":"#1A3A5C",fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:"bold",cursor:"po
inter"}}>
ūüĎ•
Todos</button>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {vendedores.map(v=><button key={v} onClick={()=>setFiltroVendedor(v)} style=
{{padding:"4px
12px",borderRadius:"20px",border:"none",background:filtroVendedor===v?"#2A5280":"#EEF4FB",colo
r:filtroVendedor===v?"#FFF":"#1A3A5C",fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:"bold",cursor:"pointer",white
Space:"nowrap"}}>
ūüĎ§
{v}</button>)}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{overflowX:"auto",marginBottom:"12px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"inline-flex",gap:"6px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <button onClick={()=>setFiltroEtapa("todos")} style={{padding:"5px
12px",borderRadius:"20px",border:"none",background:filtroEtapa==="todos"?"#1A3A5C":"#EEF4FB",c
olor:filtroEtapa==="todos"?"#FFF":"#1A3A5C",fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:"bold",cursor:"pointer"
}}>Todos ({clientes.length})</button>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {ETAPAS.map(e=>{const
count=clientes.filter(c=>c.etapa===e.id).length;if(!count&&filtroEtapa!==e.id)return
null;return(<button key={e.id} onClick={()=>setFiltroEtapa(e.id)} style={{padding:"5px
12px",borderRadius:"20px",border:"none",background:filtroEtapa===e.id?
e.cor:e.bg,color:filtroEtapa===e.id?"#FFF":e.cor,fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:"bold",cursor:"poi
nter",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{e.label} ({count})</button>);})}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {modoKanban&&<div style={{overflowX:"auto",margin:"0 -12px",padding:"4px 12px
20px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"inline-flex",gap:"10px",alignItems:"flex-
start",minWidth:"max-content"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {ETAPAS.map(etapa=>{const col=cliFiltrados.filter(c=>c.etapa===etapa.id);return(
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div key={etapa.id} style={{width:"190px",flexShrink:0}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{background:etapa.cor,borderRadius:"10px 10px 0 0",padding:"8px
10px",display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <span style={{color:"#FFF",fontWeight:"bold",fontSize:"11px"}}>
{etapa.label}</span>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <span style=
{{background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.25)",color:"#FFF",borderRadius:"20px",padding:"1px
8px",fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:"bold"}}>{col.length}</span>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{background:etapa.bg,borderRadius:"0 0 10px
10px",padding:"8px",minHeight:"80px",maxHeight:"68vh",overflowY:"auto"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {col.length===0&&<div style=
{{textAlign:"center",color:"#AAA",fontSize:"11px",padding:"16px 0"}}>Vazio</div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {col.map(cli=>{const tx=(cli.itens||[]).reduce((s,it)=>{const
p=precos[it.tipo]&&precos[it.tipo][it.variante];return s+(p?toN(p.exe):0);},0);const alerta=!
["fechado","entregue","posvenda","perdido"].includes(cli.etapa)&&diasSemContato(cli)>=3;return
(<div key={cli.id} onClick={()=>setClienteSel(cli)} style=
{{background:"#FFF",borderRadius:"9px",padding:"10px",marginBottom:"6px",boxShadow:"0 1px 5px
rgba(0,0,0,0.08)",cursor:"pointer",borderLeft:"3px solid "+etapa.cor}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{fontWeight:"bold",fontSize:"12px",color:"#1C2B3A",marginBottom:"3px"}}>{nomeExib(cli)}</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"3px",flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {tx>0&&<span style=
{{background:"#E3F2FD",color:"#1565C0",borderRadius:"5px",padding:"1px
5px",fontSize:"9px",fontWeight:"bold"}}>R${fBR(tx)}</span>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {alerta&&<span style=
{{background:"#FFEBEE",color:"#C62828",borderRadius:"5px",padding:"1px
5px",fontSize:"9px",fontWeight:"bold"}}>
‚ö†
{diasSemContato(cli)}d</span>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>);})}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† );})}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {!modoKanban&&alertasCount>0&&<div style=
{{background:"#FFEBEE",borderRadius:"12px",padding:"10px 14px",marginBottom:"12px"}}><span
style={{fontSize:"12px",fontWeight:"bold",color:"#C62828"}}>
ūüĒĒ
{alertasCount}
cliente{alertasCount>1?"s":""} sem contato h√° 3+ dias</span></div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {!modoKanban&&cliFiltrados.length===0&&<div style=
{{textAlign:"center",padding:"40px",color:"#6B7A8D"}}><div style=
{{fontSize:"32px",marginBottom:"8px"}}>
ūüĎ•
</div><div>Nenhum cliente cadastrado</div><button
onClick={()=>setModalNovo(true)} style={{marginTop:"12px",padding:"10px
20px",borderRadius:"10px",border:"none",background:"#1A3A5C",color:"#FFF",fontWeight:"bold",fo
ntSize:"13px",cursor:"pointer"}}>+ Cadastrar primeiro cliente</button></div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {!modoKanban&&cliFiltrados.map(cli=>{const ei=etapaInfo(cli.etapa);const tx=
(cli.itens||[]).reduce((s,it)=>{const p=precos[it.tipo]&&precos[it.tipo][it.variante];return
s+(p?toN(p.exe):0);},0);const alerta=!
["fechado","entregue","posvenda","perdido"].includes(cli.etapa)&&diasSemContato(cli)>=3;return
(<div key={cli.id} onClick={()=>setClienteSel(cli)} style=
{{background:"#FFF",borderRadius:"14px",padding:"16px",marginBottom:"10px",boxShadow:"0 2px
12px rgba(26,58,92,0.07)",cursor:"pointer",borderLeft:"4px solid "+
(alerta?"#C62828":ei.cor)}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"flex-
start",marginBottom:"8px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div><div style={{fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1C2B3A",fontSize:"15px"}}>
{nomeExib(cli)}</div>{cli.telefone&&<div style={{fontSize:"12px",color:"#6B7A8D"}}>
ūüďĪ
{cli.telefone}</div>}{cli.vendedor&&<div style={{fontSize:"11px",color:"#6B7A8D"}}>
ūüĎ§
{cli.vendedor}</div>}</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <span style={{background:ei.bg,color:ei.cor,borderRadius:"20px",padding:"4px
10px",fontSize:"10px",fontWeight:"bold",marginLeft:"8px",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{ei.label}
</span>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"8px",flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {tx>0&&<span style=
{{background:"#E3F2FD",color:"#1565C0",borderRadius:"6px",padding:"3px
9px",fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:"bold"}}>
‚≠ź
R$ {fBR(tx)}</span>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {(cli.itens||[]).length>0&&<span style={{fontSize:"11px",color:"#6B7A8D"}}>
ūüďč
