{cli.itens.length} itens</span>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {alerta&&<span style=
{{background:"#FFEBEE",color:"#C62828",borderRadius:"6px",padding:"2px
8px",fontSize:"10px",fontWeight:"bold"}}>
‚ö†
{diasSemContato(cli)}d</span>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>);})}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {/* ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ PRODU√á√ÉO ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ */}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {tab==="producao"&&<div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {SPRODS.map(sp=>{const cols=clientes.filter(c=>
(c.statusProducao||"aguardando")===sp.id&&!
["entregue","posvenda"].includes(c.etapa));return(<div key={sp.id} style={sCard}><div style=
{{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:"10px"}}><div
style={{fontWeight:"bold",color:sp.cor,fontSize:"13px"}}>{sp.label}</div><span style=
{{background:sp.bg,color:sp.cor,borderRadius:"20px",padding:"2px
10px",fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:"bold"}}>{cols.length}</span></div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {cols.length===0?<div style={{color:"#6B7A8D",fontSize:"12px"}}>Nenhum em
produ√ß√£o</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† :cols.map(c=>{const tx=(c.itens||[]).reduce((s,it)=>{const
p=precos[it.tipo]&&precos[it.tipo][it.variante];return s+(p?toN(p.exe):0);},0);return(<div
key={c.id} onClick={()=>setClienteSel(c)} style={{padding:"10px 0",borderTop:"1px solid
rgba(26,58,92,0.10)",cursor:"pointer"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1C2B3A",fontSize:"13px"}}>{nomeExib(c)}
</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {(c.itens||[]).length>0&&<div style={{fontSize:"11px",color:"#6B7A8D"}}>
{c.itens.map(it=>it.tipo).join(" ¬∑ ")}</div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {tx>0&&<div style=
{{fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1565C0",marginTop:"2px"}}>R$ {fBR(tx)}</div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>);})}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>);})}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {/* ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ FINANCEIRO ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ */}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {tab==="financeiro"&&(()=>{
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† const cliMes=clientes.filter(c=>{if(!
["fechado","entregue","posvenda"].includes(c.etapa))return false;const d=new
Date(c.atualizadoEm||c.criadoEm||Date.now());return d.getFullYear()+"-
"+String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,"0")===mesAtual();});
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† const fatBruto=cliMes.reduce((s,c)=>{const pl=c.planoEscolhido==="ess"?(c.itens||
[]).reduce((x,it)=>{const p=precos[it.tipo]&&precos[it.tipo][it.variante];return x+(p?
toN(p.ess):0);},0):c.planoEscolhido==="pre"?(c.itens||[]).reduce((x,it)=>{const
p=precos[it.tipo]&&precos[it.tipo][it.variante];return x+(p?toN(p.pre):0);},0):(c.itens||
[]).reduce((x,it)=>{const p=precos[it.tipo]&&precos[it.tipo][it.variante];return x+(p?
toN(p.exe):0);},0);return s+pl;},0);
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† const recebido=cliMes.reduce((s,c)=>s+toN(c.entradaPaga)+toN(c.saldoPago),0);
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† return(<div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr
1fr",gap:"10px",marginBottom:"14px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {[["
ūüíį
","Faturamento",fBR(fatBruto),"#EEF4FB","#1A3A5C"],
["
‚úÖ
","Recebido",fBR(recebido),"#E8F5E9","#1B5E20"],
["
ūüďč
","Fechamentos",cliMes.length,"#FFF3E0","#E65100"]].map(m=><div key={m[1]} style=
{{background:m[3],borderRadius:"14px",padding:"14px 10px",textAlign:"center"}}><div style=
{{fontSize:"20px"}}>{m[0]}</div><div style=
{{fontSize:"16px",fontWeight:"bold",color:m[4],marginTop:"4px"}}>{"R$ "+m[2]}</div><div style=
{{fontSize:"9px",color:m[4],fontWeight:"bold",textTransform:"uppercase"}}>{m[1]}</div></div>)}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={sCard}><div style=
{{fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C",fontSize:"13px",marginBottom:"12px"}}>
ūüíį
Fechamentos do
m√™s</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {cliMes.length===0?<div style={{color:"#6B7A8D",fontSize:"12px"}}>Nenhum
fechamento este m√™s.</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† :cliMes.map(c=>{const val=(c.itens||[]).reduce((s,it)=>{const
p=precos[it.tipo]&&precos[it.tipo][it.variante];return s+(p?toN(p.exe):0);},0);const
rec=toN(c.entradaPaga)+toN(c.saldoPago);return(<div key={c.id} style={{padding:"10px
0",borderTop:"1px solid rgba(26,58,92,0.10)"}}><div style=
{{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between"}}><div style=
{{fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1C2B3A",fontSize:"13px"}}>{nomeExib(c)}</div><div style=
{{fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C"}}>R$ {fBR(val)}</div></div><div style=
{{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",marginTop:"2px"}}><span style=
{{fontSize:"11px",color:"#6B7A8D"}}>{c.vendedor||"‚ÄĒ"}</span><span style=
{{fontSize:"11px",color:rec>=val?"#1B5E20":"#C62828",fontWeight:"600"}}>Rec: R$ {fBR(rec)}
</span></div></div>);})}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>);
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† })()}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {/* ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ DASHBOARD ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ */}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {tab==="dashboard"&&<div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr
1fr",gap:"10px",marginBottom:"14px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {[["
ūüĎ•
","Total clientes",clientes.length,"#EEF4FB","#1A3A5C"],["
‚úÖ
","Taxa
convers√£o",taxaConv.toFixed(0)+"%","#E8F5E9","#1B5E20"],
["
ūüďč
","Fechados",totalFechados,"#FFF3E0","#E65100"],
["
‚ĚĆ
","Perdidos",clientes.filter(c=>c.etapa==="perdido").length,"#FFEBEE","#C62828"]].map(m=>
<div key={m[1]} style={{background:m[3],borderRadius:"14px",padding:"14px
12px",textAlign:"center"}}><div style={{fontSize:"22px"}}>{m[0]}</div><div style=
{{fontSize:"22px",fontWeight:"bold",color:m[4],marginTop:"4px"}}>{m[2]}</div><div style=
{{fontSize:"10px",color:m[4],fontWeight:"bold",textTransform:"uppercase",marginTop:"2px"}}>
{m[1]}</div></div>)}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{...sCard,marginBottom:"12px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C",fontSize:"13px",marginBottom:"4px"}}>
ūüďą
Faturamento ‚ÄĒ
√ļltimos 6 meses</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{fontSize:"11px",color:"#6B7A8D",marginBottom:"14px"}}>Total: R$
{fBR(meses6.reduce((s,m)=>s+m.total,0))} ¬∑ {meses6.reduce((s,m)=>s+m.count,0)}
fechamentos</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {maxBar===0?<div style=
{{textAlign:"center",color:"#6B7A8D",fontSize:"12px",padding:"20px 0"}}>Nenhum fechamento
registrado ainda.</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† :<ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={180}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <BarChart data={meses6} barSize={32} margin={{top:4,right:4,left:0,bottom:0}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <XAxis dataKey="label" tick={{fontSize:11,fill:"#6B7A8D"}} axisLine={false}
tickLine={false}/>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <YAxis hide={true} domain={[0,maxBar*1.15]}/>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <Tooltip content={<CustomTooltip/>} cursor={{fill:"rgba(26,58,92,0.06)"}}/>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <Bar dataKey="total" radius={[6,6,0,0]}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {meses6.map((entry,index)=><Cell key={index} fill=
{CORES_BAR[index]||"#1A3A5C"}/>)}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </Bar>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </BarChart>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </ResponsiveContainer>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{...sCard,marginBottom:"12px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C",fontSize:"13px",marginBottom:"12px"}}>
ūüéĮ
Planos
escolhidos</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {[["
ūüĒĶ
Essencial",planos.ess,"#37474F","#ECEFF1"],["
‚≠ź
Executivo",planos.exe,"#1565C0","#E3F2FD"],["
ūüíé
Premium",planos.pre,"#6A1B9A","#F3E5F5"]].map(x=>{const
tot=Object.values(planos).reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)||1;const pct=(x[1]/tot*100);return(<div key=
{x[0]} style={{marginBottom:"10px"}}><div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-
between",fontSize:"12px",marginBottom:"4px"}}><span style={{fontWeight:"bold",color:x[2]}}>
{x[0]}</span><span style={{color:"#6B7A8D"}}>{x[1]} ‚ÄĒ {pct.toFixed(0)}%</span></div><div
style={{height:"10px",borderRadius:"5px",background:"#EEE",overflow:"hidden"}}><div style=
{{height:"100%",borderRadius:"5px",background:x[2],width:pct+"%"}}/></div></div>);})}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {/* ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ OR√áAMENTO ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ */}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {tab==="orcamento"&&<div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-
between",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:"10px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <span style={{fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C",fontSize:"13px"}}>
{itensOrc.length} {itensOrc.length===1?"item":"itens"}</span>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {itensOrc.length>1&&<button onClick={()=>setItensOrc([novoItem()])} style=
{{background:"#FFEBEE",border:"none",color:"#C62828",borderRadius:"8px",padding:"5px
12px",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:"12px",fontWeight:"bold"}}>
ūüóĎ
Limpar</button>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {itensOrc.map((it,i)=><ItemCard key={it.id} item={it} idx={i} total=
{itensOrc.length} precos={precos} onUpdate={updItemOrc} onRemove={rmItemOrc}/>)}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <button onClick={addItemOrc} style=
{{width:"100%",padding:"12px",borderRadius:"10px",border:"2px dashed
#2A5280",background:"transparent",color:"#1A3A5C",fontWeight:"bold",fontSize:"13px",cursor:"po
inter",marginBottom:"12px"}}>+ Adicionar item</button>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr
1fr",gap:"8px",marginBottom:"12px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {[["
ūüĒĶ
",itensOrc.reduce((s,it)=>{const p=precos[it.tipo]&&precos[it.tipo]
[it.variante];if(!p)return s;const v=it.overEss!==""&&it.overEss!==undefined?
toN(it.overEss):toN(p.ess);return s+v;},0),"#ECEFF1","#37474F"],["
‚≠ź
",itensOrc.reduce((s,it)=>
{const p=precos[it.tipo]&&precos[it.tipo][it.variante];if(!p)return s;const
v=it.overExe!==""&&it.overExe!==undefined?toN(it.overExe):toN(p.exe);return
s+v;},0),"#E3F2FD","#1565C0"],["
ūüíé
",itensOrc.reduce((s,it)=>{const
p=precos[it.tipo]&&precos[it.tipo][it.variante];if(!p)return s;const
v=it.overPre!==""&&it.overPre!==undefined?toN(it.overPre):toN(p.pre);return
s+v;},0),"#F3E5F5","#6A1B9A"]].map(x=><div key={x[0]} style=
{{background:x[2],borderRadius:"10px",padding:"10px",textAlign:"center"}}><div style=
{{fontSize:"16px"}}>{x[0]}</div><div style={{fontSize:"15px",fontWeight:"bold",color:x[3]}}>R$
{fBR(x[1])}</div><div style={{fontSize:"10px",color:x[3]}}>10x {parc(x[1])}</div></div>)}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"8px",marginBottom:"8px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <button onClick={copiarOrc} style=
{{flex:1,padding:"13px",borderRadius:"12px",border:"none",background:copiadoOrc?"#1B5E20":"#1A
3A5C",color:"#FFF",fontWeight:"bold",fontSize:"14px",cursor:"pointer"}}>{copiadoOrc?"
‚úÖ
Copiado!":"
ūüďč
Copiar"}</button>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <a href={waUrlOrc} target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" style=
{{flex:1,padding:"13px",borderRadius:"12px",background:"#25D366",color:"#FFF",fontWeight:"bold
",fontSize:"14px",textAlign:"center",textDecoration:"none",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",
justifyContent:"center"}}>
ūüď≤
WhatsApp</a>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <button onClick={baixarOrc} style=
{{width:"100%",padding:"12px",borderRadius:"12px",border:"1.5px solid
#1A3A5C",background:"#EEF4FB",color:"#1A3A5C",fontWeight:"bold",fontSize:"13px",cursor:"pointe
r"}}>
‚¨á
Baixar or√ßamento (.txt)</button>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {/* ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ OBJE√á√ēES ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ */}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {tab==="objecoes"&&<div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{fontSize:"12px",color:"#6B7A8D",marginBottom:"12px",textAlign:"center",fontWeight:"bold"}}>T
oque para copiar a resposta
ūüďč
</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {OBJECOES.map((o,i)=><div key={i} onClick={()=>
{setObjecaoCop(i);if(navigator.clipboard&&navigator.clipboard.writeText)navigator.clipboard.wr
iteText(o.resp).catch(()=>{});setTimeout(()=>setObjecaoCop(null),2500);}} style=
{{background:"#FFF",borderRadius:"14px",padding:"16px",marginBottom:"10px",boxShadow:"0 2px
10px rgba(26,58,92,0.07)",cursor:"pointer",borderLeft:"4px solid "+
(objecaoCop===i?"#1B5E20":"#1A3A5C")}}><div style=
{{fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C",fontSize:"13px",marginBottom:"8px"}}>
‚Ěď
{o.obj}</div><div
style={{fontSize:"12.5px",color:"#6B7A8D",whiteSpace:"pre-wrap",lineHeight:"1.65"}}>{o.resp}
</div><div style=
{{marginTop:"8px",fontSize:"11px",color:objecaoCop===i?"#1B5E20":"#CCC",fontWeight:"bold"}}>
{objecaoCop===i?"
‚úÖ
Copiado!":"Toque para copiar"}</div></div>)}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {/* ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ P√ďS-VENDA ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ */}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {tab==="posvenda"&&<div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {SCRIPTS_POS.map((s,i)=>{const k="ps-"+i;return(<div key={i} style={sCard}><div
style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-
between",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:"10px"}}><div style=
{{fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C",fontSize:"13px"}}>
‚≠ź
{s.label}</div><button onClick={()=>
{if(navigator.clipboard&&navigator.clipboard.writeText)navigator.clipboard.writeText(s.texto).
catch(()=>{});setObjecaoCop(k);setTimeout(()=>setObjecaoCop(null),2500);}} style=
{{padding:"6px
12px",borderRadius:"8px",border:"none",background:objecaoCop===k?"#1B5E20":"#25D366",color:"#F
FF",fontWeight:"bold",fontSize:"11px",cursor:"pointer"}}>{objecaoCop===k?"
‚úÖ
Copiado":"
ūüďč
Copiar"}</button></div><div style=
{{background:"#F9F9F9",borderRadius:"8px",padding:"12px",fontSize:"12px",color:"#333",whiteSpa
ce:"pre-wrap",lineHeight:"1.7",border:"1px solid #EEE"}}>{s.texto}</div></div>);})}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {/* ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ ARIA IA ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ */}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {tab==="ia"&&<div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",height:"calc(100vh -
200px)",minHeight:"400px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",marginBottom:"10px",display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:"10px"
}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {iaMsgs.length===0&&<div style={{textAlign:"center",padding:"24px
16px",color:"#6B7A8D"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{fontSize:"36px",marginBottom:"10px"}}>
ūü§Ė
</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C",fontSize:"15px",marginBottom:"8px"}}>Ol√°! Sou a ARIA</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{fontSize:"12px",lineHeight:"1.6",marginBottom:"14px"}}>Especialista
em vendas de estofados. Conhe√ßo todos os pre√ßos e clientes da BS M√≥veis.</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{background:"#FFF8E7",borderRadius:"10px",padding:"12px",fontSize:"11px",color:"#856404",marg
inBottom:"14px"}}>
‚ö†
Para usar a ARIA, configure sua chave da API Anthropic no c√≥digo
(vari√°vel ANTHROPIC_API_KEY).</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {["Quais clientes devo priorizar hoje?","Script para fechar cliente em
negocia√ß√£o","Como responder obje√ß√£o de pre√ßo?"].map(s=><button key={s} onClick=
{()=>setIaInput(s)} style={{display:"block",width:"100%",background:"#EEF4FB",border:"1px
solid rgba(26,58,92,0.10)",borderRadius:"10px",padding:"9px
14px",fontSize:"12px",color:"#1A3A5C",fontWeight:"bold",cursor:"pointer",textAlign:"left",marg
inBottom:"6px"}}>
ūüí¨
{s}</button>)}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {iaMsgs.map((m,i)=><div key={i} style=
{{display:"flex",justifyContent:m.role==="user"?"flex-end":"flex-start"}}><div style=
{{maxWidth:"82%",padding:"10px 14px",borderRadius:m.role==="user"?"14px 14px 4px 14px":"14px
14px 14px
4px",background:m.role==="user"?"#1A3A5C":"#FFF",color:m.role==="user"?"#FFF":"#1C2B3A",fontSi
ze:"13px",lineHeight:"1.6",boxShadow:"0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)",whiteSpace:"pre-
wrap",wordBreak:"break-word"}}>{m.content}</div></div>)}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {iaLoading&&<div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:"8px"}}><div
style={{background:"#FFF",borderRadius:"14px 14px 14px 4px",padding:"12px 16px",boxShadow:"0
2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)",color:"#6B7A8D",fontSize:"12px"}}>
‚úć
Pensando...</div></div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div ref={iaBottomRef}/>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"8px",alignItems:"flex-end"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <textarea value={iaInput} onChange={e=>setIaInput(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={e=>
{if(e.key==="Enter"&&!e.shiftKey){e.preventDefault();enviarIA();}}} placeholder="Pergunte...
(Enter envia)" style=
{{...sInp,flex:1,minHeight:"44px",maxHeight:"120px",resize:"none",lineHeight:"1.5"}} rows=
{1}/>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <button onClick={enviarIA} disabled={iaLoading||!iaInput.trim()} style=
{{padding:"11px 16px",borderRadius:"10px",border:"none",background:
(iaLoading||!iaInput.trim())?"#CCC":"#1A3A5C",color:"#FFF",fontWeight:"bold",fontSize:"14px",c
ursor:(iaLoading||!iaInput.trim())?"default":"pointer"}}>{iaLoading?"
‚Ź≥
":"‚ě§"}</button>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {/* ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ CONFIG ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ */}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {tab==="config"&&<div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"6px",marginBottom:"14px",overflowX:"auto"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {[["backup","
ūüíĺ
Backup"],["empresa","
ūüŹĘ
Empresa"],["precos","
ūüíį
Pre√ßos"],
["tecidos","
ūüßĶ
Tecidos"],["metas","
ūüéĮ
Metas"],["objecoes","
ūü§Ě
Obje√ß√Ķes"],["log","
ūüďč
Log"]].map(x=><button key={x[0]} onClick={()=>setSecaoConfig(x[0])} style={{padding:"5px
12px",borderRadius:"20px",border:"none",background:secaoConfig===x[0]?"#1A3A5C":"#EEF4FB",colo
r:secaoConfig===x[0]?"#FFF":"#1A3A5C",fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:"bold",cursor:"pointer",white
Space:"nowrap"}}>{x[1]}</button>)}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {secaoConfig==="backup"&&<div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{background:"#FFF8E7",borderRadius:"12px",padding:"14px",marginBottom:"14px",border:"1px
solid #FFE082"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{fontWeight:"bold",color:"#F57F17",fontSize:"13px",marginBottom:"4px"}}>
‚ö†
Dados salvos
localmente (localStorage)</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{fontSize:"12px",color:"#5D4037",lineHeight:"1.6"}}>Fa√ßa backup
regularmente para n√£o perder dados!</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={sCard}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C",fontSize:"13px",marginBottom:"4px"}}>
ūüďä
Volume atual</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{fontSize:"12px",color:"#6B7A8D",marginBottom:"16px"}}>
{clientes.length} clientes ¬∑ {tecidos.length} tecidos ¬∑ ~
{Math.round(JSON.stringify({precos,clientes,tecidos,metas}).length/1024)} KB</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <button onClick={exportarJSON} style=
{{width:"100%",padding:"14px",borderRadius:"12px",border:"none",background:"#1A3A5C",color:"#F
FF",fontWeight:"bold",fontSize:"14px",cursor:"pointer",marginBottom:"8px"}}>
‚¨á
Baixar backup
.json</button>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <button onClick={copiarJSON} style=
{{width:"100%",padding:"11px",borderRadius:"10px",border:"1.5px solid
#1A3A5C",background:exportCopiado?"#E8F5E9":"#FFF",color:exportCopiado?"#1B5E20":"#1A3A5C",fon
tWeight:"bold",fontSize:"13px",cursor:"pointer"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {exportCopiado?"
‚úÖ
Copiado!":"
ūüďč
Ver / Copiar JSON"}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </button>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {showJsonArea&&<div style={{marginTop:"10px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <textarea readOnly value={jsonText} onClick={e=>e.target.select()} style=
{{width:"100%",height:"140px",borderRadius:"10px",border:"1.5px solid
#1A3A5C",padding:"10px",fontSize:"11px",fontFamily:"monospace",background:"#F7F9FC",boxSizing:
"border-box",resize:"none"}}/>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <button onClick={()=>setShowJsonArea(false)} style=
{{width:"100%",marginTop:"6px",padding:"8px",borderRadius:"8px",border:"1px solid
#DDD",background:"#FFF",color:"#888",fontSize:"11px",cursor:"pointer"}}>Fechar</button>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={sCard}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C",fontSize:"13px",marginBottom:"6px"}}>
ūüďĀ
Restaurar
backup</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{fontSize:"12px",color:"#C62828",fontWeight:"bold",marginBottom:"12px"}}>
‚ö†
Substituir√° TODOS
os dados atuais!</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {!pendingImport&&<input type="file" accept=".json" onChange={importarJSON}
style={{width:"100%",padding:"8px",borderRadius:"8px",border:"1.5px solid
#1A3A5C",background:"#FFF",fontSize:"13px",cursor:"pointer",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {pendingImport&&<div style={{borderRadius:"12px",border:"2px solid
#C62828",background:"#FFEBEE",padding:"16px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{fontSize:"12px",color:"#5D4037",marginBottom:"12px"}}>Arquivo com
{(pendingImport.clientes||[]).length} clientes ¬∑ exportado em {pendingImport.exportadoEm?new
Date(pendingImport.exportadoEm).toLocaleDateString("pt-BR"):"?"}</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"flex",gap:"8px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <button onClick={()=>setPendingImport(null)} style=
{{flex:1,padding:"11px",borderRadius:"10px",border:"1.5px solid
#DDD",background:"#FFF",color:"#555",fontWeight:"bold",fontSize:"13px",cursor:"pointer"}}>Canc
elar</button>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <button onClick={confirmarImport} style=
{{flex:1,padding:"11px",borderRadius:"10px",border:"none",background:"#C62828",color:"#FFF",fo
ntWeight:"bold",fontSize:"13px",cursor:"pointer"}}>
‚úÖ
Confirmar</button>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {importStatus==="ok"&&<div style=
{{marginTop:"10px",padding:"12px",background:"#E8F5E9",borderRadius:"10px",textAlign:"center",
fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1B5E20"}}>
‚úÖ
Dados restaurados!</div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {importStatus==="erro"&&<div style=
{{marginTop:"10px",padding:"12px",background:"#FFEBEE",borderRadius:"10px",textAlign:"center",
fontWeight:"bold",color:"#C62828"}}>
‚ĚĆ
Arquivo inv√°lido.</div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {secaoConfig==="empresa"&&<div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={sCard}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C",fontSize:"13px",marginBottom:"14px"}}>
ūüŹĘ
Dados da
Empresa</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {[["Nome da empresa","nome","BS M√≥veis Estofados"],["WhatsApp (DDD +
n√ļmero)","whatsapp","71985039240"],["Cidade(s) de atendimento","cidade","Salvador e Lauro de
Freitas"]].map(f=><div key={f[1]} style={{marginBottom:"12px"}}><div style=
{{fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C",marginBottom:"4px",textTransform:"uppercas
e"}}>{f[0]}</div><input value={draftEmp[f[1]]||""} onChange={e=>{const
v=e.target.value;setDraftEmp(p=>({...p,[f[1]]:v}));}} placeholder={f[2]} style={sInp}/>
</div>)}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{marginBottom:"14px"}}><div style=
{{fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C",marginBottom:"4px"}}>Sauda√ß√£o nas
mensagens</div><textarea value={draftEmp.saudacao||""} onChange={e=>{const
v=e.target.value;setDraftEmp(p=>({...p,saudacao:v}));}} rows={2} style=
{{...sInp,resize:"none",lineHeight:"1.5"}}/></div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <button onClick={salvarEmp} style=
{{width:"100%",padding:"12px",borderRadius:"10px",border:"none",background:empSalvo?"#1B5E20":
"#1A3A5C",color:"#FFF",fontWeight:"bold",fontSize:"13px",cursor:"pointer"}}>{empSalvo?"
‚úÖ
Salvo!":"
ūüíĺ
Salvar configura√ß√Ķes"}</button>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {secaoConfig==="precos"&&<div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{fontSize:"12px",color:"#6B7A8D",marginBottom:"12px"}}>
‚ö†
Edite os
pre√ßos para personalizar os or√ßamentos.</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {TIPOS.map(tipo=><div key={tipo} style={sCard}><div style=
{{fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C",fontSize:"13px",marginBottom:"8px"}}>{tipo}</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {Object.entries(precos[tipo]||{}).map(([variante,vals])=><div key={variante}
style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",padding:"8px
0",borderTop:"1px solid rgba(26,58,92,0.10)"}}><div style={{flex:1}}><div style=
{{fontSize:"12px",fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1C2B3A"}}>{variante}</div><div style=
{{fontSize:"11px",color:"#6B7A8D"}}>Ess R${vals.ess} ¬∑ Exe R${vals.exe} ¬∑ Pre R${vals.pre}
</div></div><button onClick={()=>
{setEditandoPreco({tipo,variante});setEditVals({ess:vals.ess,exe:vals.exe,pre:vals.pre});}}
style={{padding:"5px 12px",borderRadius:"8px",border:"1.5px solid
#1A3A5C",background:"#FFF",color:"#1A3A5C",fontSize:"12px",fontWeight:"bold",cursor:"pointer"}
}>
‚úŹ
</button></div>)}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>)}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <button onClick={()=>{if(window.confirm("Resetar todos os pre√ßos para o
padr√£o?"))salvarTudo(PRECOS_ORIG,null,null,null,"Resetou pre√ßos");}} style=
{{width:"100%",padding:"11px",borderRadius:"10px",border:"1.5px solid
#C62828",background:"#FFEBEE",color:"#C62828",fontWeight:"bold",fontSize:"13px",cursor:"pointe
r"}}>
‚Ü©
Resetar todos os pre√ßos</button>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {secaoConfig==="tecidos"&&<div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={sCard}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C",fontSize:"13px",marginBottom:"12px"}}>
‚ěē
Adicionar
tecido</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr
1fr",gap:"10px",marginBottom:"10px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {[["Nome","nome","Veludo Inca"],["Cor","cor","Cinza"],["Metros","metros","0"],
["M√≠n.","minimo","2"]].map(f=><div key={f[1]}><div style=
{{fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C",marginBottom:"3px"}}>{f[0]}</div><input
value={novoTecido[f[1]]} onChange={e=>{const v=e.target.value;setNovoTecido(p=>({...p,
[f[1]]:v}));}} placeholder={f[2]} style={sInp}/></div>)}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{marginBottom:"12px"}}><select value={novoTecido.plano} onChange=
{e=>{const v=e.target.value;setNovoTecido(p=>({...p,plano:v}));}} style={sInp}><option
value="ess">
ūüĒĶ
Essencial</option><option value="exe">
‚≠ź
Executivo</option><option
value="pre">
ūüíé
Premium</option></select></div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <button onClick={()=>{if(!novoTecido.nome.trim())return;salvarTudo(null,null,
[...tecidos,{id:Math.random(),...novoTecido}],null,"Adicionou tecido:
"+novoTecido.nome);setNovoTecido({nome:"",cor:"",metros:"0",minimo:"2",plano:"exe"});}} style=
{{width:"100%",padding:"11px",borderRadius:"10px",border:"none",background:"#1A3A5C",color:"#F
FF",fontWeight:"bold",fontSize:"13px",cursor:"pointer"}}>+ Adicionar</button>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {tecidos.map(t=>{const baixo=toN(t.metros)<=toN(t.minimo);return(<div key={t.id}
style={{...sCard,borderLeft:"4px solid "+(baixo?"#C62828":"#1B5E20")}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",marginBottom:"8px"}}>
<div><div style={{fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1C2B3A"}}>{t.nome}{t.cor?" ‚ÄĒ "+t.cor:""}</div><div
style={{fontSize:"11px",color:"#6B7A8D"}}>{{ess:"
ūüĒĶ
Essencial",exe:"
‚≠ź
Executivo",pre:"
ūüíé
Premium"}[t.plano]}</div></div><button onClick=
{()=>salvarTudo(null,null,tecidos.filter(x=>x.id!==t.id),null,"Removeu tecido")} style=
{{background:"#FFEBEE",border:"none",color:"#C62828",borderRadius:"8px",padding:"4px
10px",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:"12px",fontWeight:"bold"}}>‚úē</button></div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:"10px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div><div style=
{{fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C",marginBottom:"3px"}}>Metros</div><input
value={t.metros} onChange={e=>{const v=e.target.value.replace(/[^0-
9.,]/g,"");salvarTudo(null,null,tecidos.map(x=>x.id===t.id?
{...x,metros:v}:x),null,"Estoque");}} style=
{{...sInp,textAlign:"center",fontWeight:"bold",background:baixo?"#FFEBEE":"#F7F9FC",color:baix
o?"#C62828":"#1C2B3A"}}/></div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div><div style=
{{fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C",marginBottom:"3px"}}>M√≠n.</div><input
value={t.minimo} onChange={e=>{const v=e.target.value.replace(/[^0-
9.,]/g,"");salvarTudo(null,null,tecidos.map(x=>x.id===t.id?
{...x,minimo:v}:x),null,"M√≠nimo");}} style={{...sInp,textAlign:"center"}}/></div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {baixo&&<div style=
{{marginTop:"8px",fontSize:"11px",color:"#C62828",fontWeight:"bold",background:"#FFEBEE",borde
rRadius:"8px",padding:"5px 10px"}}>
‚ö†
Estoque abaixo do m√≠nimo!</div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>);})}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {secaoConfig==="metas"&&<div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={sCard}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C",fontSize:"13px",marginBottom:"12px"}}>
‚ěē
Definir
meta</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr
1fr",gap:"10px",marginBottom:"10px"}}>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div><div style=
{{fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C",marginBottom:"3px"}}>Vendedor</div><input
value={novaMeta.vendedor} onChange={e=>{const v=e.target.value;setNovaMeta(p=>
({...p,vendedor:v}));}} placeholder="Nome" style={sInp}/></div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div><div style=
{{fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C",marginBottom:"3px"}}>M√™s</div><input
type="month" value={novaMeta.mes} onChange={e=>{const v=e.target.value;setNovaMeta(p=>
({...p,mes:v}));}} style={sInp}/></div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div><div style=
{{fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C",marginBottom:"3px"}}>Meta (R$)</div><input
value={novaMeta.meta} onChange={e=>{const v=e.target.value.replace(/[^0-
9.,]/g,"");setNovaMeta(p=>({...p,meta:v}));}} placeholder="15000" style={sInp}/></div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div><div style=
{{fontSize:"11px",fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C",marginBottom:"3px"}}>Comiss√£o (%)</div>
<input value={novaMeta.comissaoPct} onChange={e=>{const v=e.target.value.replace(/[^0-
9.,]/g,"");setNovaMeta(p=>({...p,comissaoPct:v}));}} placeholder="5" style={sInp}/></div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <button onClick={()=>{if(!novaMeta.vendedor.trim())return;const
nm=metas.filter(m=>!
(m.vendedor===novaMeta.vendedor&&m.mes===novaMeta.mes)).concat([{id:Math.random(),...novaMeta}
]);salvarTudo(null,null,null,nm,"Atualizou
metas");setNovaMeta({vendedor:"",meta:"0",comissaoPct:"5",mes:mesAtual()});}} style=
{{width:"100%",padding:"11px",borderRadius:"10px",border:"none",background:"#1A3A5C",color:"#F
FF",fontWeight:"bold",fontSize:"13px",cursor:"pointer"}}>+ Salvar meta</button>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {metas.sort((a,b)=>b.mes.localeCompare(a.mes)).map(m=><div key={m.id} style=
{{...sCard,borderLeft:"4px solid #C8A84B"}}><div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-
between"}}><div><div style={{fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1C2B3A"}}>{m.vendedor}</div><div style=
{{fontSize:"12px",color:"#6B7A8D"}}>{m.mes} ¬∑ Meta: R$ {fBR(toN(m.meta))} ¬∑ {m.comissaoPct}%
</div></div><button onClick=
{()=>salvarTudo(null,null,null,metas.filter(x=>x.id!==m.id),null,"Removeu meta")} style=
{{background:"#FFEBEE",border:"none",color:"#C62828",borderRadius:"8px",padding:"4px
10px",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:"12px",fontWeight:"bold"}}>‚úē</button></div></div>)}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {secaoConfig==="objecoes"&&<div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{fontSize:"12px",color:"#6B7A8D",marginBottom:"12px",textAlign:"center"}}>Toque para copiar
ūüďč
</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {OBJECOES.map((o,i)=><div key={i} onClick={()=>
{setObjecaoCop(i);if(navigator.clipboard&&navigator.clipboard.writeText)navigator.clipboard.wr
iteText(o.resp).catch(()=>{});setTimeout(()=>setObjecaoCop(null),2000);}} style=
{{background:"#FFF",borderRadius:"14px",padding:"16px",marginBottom:"10px",boxShadow:"0 2px
10px rgba(26,58,92,0.07)",cursor:"pointer",borderLeft:"4px solid "+
(objecaoCop===i?"#1B5E20":"#1A3A5C")}}><div style=
{{fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C",fontSize:"13px",marginBottom:"8px"}}>
‚Ěď
{o.obj}</div><div
style={{fontSize:"12px",color:"#6B7A8D",whiteSpace:"pre-wrap",lineHeight:"1.65"}}>{o.resp}
</div><div style=
{{marginTop:"8px",fontSize:"11px",color:objecaoCop===i?"#1B5E20":"#CCC",fontWeight:"bold"}}>
{objecaoCop===i?"
‚úÖ
Copiado!":"Toque para copiar"}</div></div>)}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {secaoConfig==="log"&&<div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† <div style=
{{fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C",fontSize:"13px",marginBottom:"12px"}}>
ūüďč
Atividades
Recentes ({log.length})</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† {log.length===0?<div style={{textAlign:"center",color:"#6B7A8D",padding:"24px
0"}}>Nenhuma atividade.</div>
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† :[...log].reverse().map((entry,i)=><div key={i} style=
{{background:"#FFF",borderRadius:"12px",padding:"10px 14px",marginBottom:"8px",boxShadow:"0
1px 6px rgba(26,58,92,0.07)"}}><div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-
between",marginBottom:"3px"}}><span style=
{{fontWeight:"bold",color:"#1A3A5C",fontSize:"12px"}}>
ūüĎ§
{entry.user||"Sistema"}</span><span
style={{fontSize:"10px",color:"#AAA"}}>{entry.hora||""}</span></div><div style=
{{fontSize:"12px",color:"#1C2B3A"}}>{entry.acao||"‚ÄĒ"}</div></div>)}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>}
Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô†Óô†Óô† </div>
Óô† );
}
ReactDOM.createRoot(document.getElementById('root')).render(<App />);
</script>
</body>
</html>
